Name: Magnum Security

Founded in 2003, Magnum Security provides proactive security services to the UAE's wide range of customers in a variety of industries and customer segments. Our mission is to provide the highest quality of professional security services by delivering operational excellence to exceed our client’s expectation at every curve. Name: First Security Group LLC
Description: “First Security Group LLC was founded in 2004 with the vision of His Highness, the Vice President, Prime Minister, and Ruler of Dubai, Sheikh Mohamed bin Rashid Al Maktoum. Each member of the Board brings 35 to 40 years of official security experience to the table as well as business acumen from a number of prestigious locally-owned groups of companies. The blend of experience, integrity, and quality has made First Security Group LLC the market leader it is today and offers a range of security and risk services to our prestigious clients. On behalf of the First Security Group Board of Directors, we offer our thanks to our partners and clients and wish you continued success in your business ventures.”

Name: ASTER
Description:
A ASTER Sistemas de Segurança vem desde 2004, se notabilizando pelo uso de tecnologia e inovadores processos operacionais na prestação de serviços a condomínios residenciais, comerciais, empresas, shopping centers e bairros residenciais.

Com mais de 20 anos de crescimento sustentado e em busca de uma maior especialização em suas operações, a companhia reorganizou-se recentemente sob duas marcas: ASTERSEG Segurança e ATRSERV Facilities.

Mas, seja no fornecimento de sistemas e soluções de segurança, ou na terceirização de mão-de-obra dos mais diversos perfis profissionais, as crenças e valores da ASTER Sistemas de Segurança continuam os mesmos: buscar continuamente a excelência na capacitação e motivação de nossos colaboradores, a gestão e melhoria de processos e o uso de novas tecnologias, sempre respeitando as questões sociais e ambientais.

Hoje, temos um time formado por cerca de 2.000 funcionários que recebem treinamento e passam por avaliações técnicas e supervisão constante. Prestamos serviços na cidade de São Paulo e algumas cidades do interior como Limeira, Araraquara, Campinas e região, atendendo a centenas de clientes e beneficiando milhares de moradores, colaboradores e usuários.

Name: Metro One Security
Description:
Since 1994, Metro One has grown from a local, guard-based security firm into a nationally recognized leader in retail loss prevention—trusted by 8 of the Top 10 U.S. Retailers.* 

Built on a legacy of reliability, we’ve evolved with retail to stay ahead of emerging threats. From disciplined hiring and training, to breakthrough strategies, we don’t just respond to threats, we prevent loss before it occurs.
All operations are powered by Aurix, our proprietary automation platform, delivering  industry-leading prevention, detection, and reporting.

As a privately owned, living-wage employer, we attract and retain proven officers, for stronger alignment and more consistent operations.

From dock to display, through store openings and seasonal surges, Metro One  integrates with operations, anticipates change, and adapts in real time to protect people, product, and profit.

Name: SEGURO SEGURANÇA
Description:
Desde 2012, a Seguro atua com excelência, oferecendo soluções completas em Segurança Patrimonial, Terceirização de Mão de Obra, Segurança Eletrônica e Portaria Remota. Estamos presentes nos estados do Ceará, Piauí, Maranhão, Paraíba, Rio Grande do Norte, Sergipe e Alagoas.

Temos como missão proporcionar tranquilidade, segurança e bem-estar para clientes e colaboradores.
Esse compromisso nos levou a ser reconhecidos como a 4ª melhor empresa para trabalhar no Ceará, com certificação GPTW por 5 anos consecutivos.

Construímos relações duradouras baseadas na confiança, na eficiência e no cuidado com cada detalhe.

Felicidade é viver Seguro.

Name: Innovision Limited

Partner with Innovision Limited today to access a top-quality skilled workforce and drive success in your business. Contact us now to discuss your staffing needs and explore how we can collaborate to achieve your business goals.

Name: Qatar Security Services WLL
Description:
Qatar Security Services (QSS)
Trusted Since 1996 | MOI SSD Approved Contractor | Qatar’s First Licensed Private Security Company

Protecting Qatar’s future with over 30 years of expert security solutions.
Since 1996, Qatar Security Services (QSS) has been a pioneer in Qatar’s private security sector as the first licensed company to provide professional security guard services. As an MOI Security Services Department (SSD) approved contractor, we maintain the highest safety, compliance, and quality standards.

With 30+ years of experience, QSS delivers tailored security solutions to protect your people, assets, and premises, helping your business run smoothly and securely. Combining skilled personnel with advanced technology, we serve various industries across Qatar.

Our services include:
• Security Guard Services: Premises protection, incident response, emergency coordination, traffic control, and conflict management.
• CCTV Control Room Monitoring: Real-time video surveillance, alarm response, system maintenance, and reporting.
• Secure Transport: Armored vehicles with GPS, CCTV, and alarms for safe transfer of cash, valuables, and sensitive documents.
• Property Monitoring: Intrusion detection, biometric access, fire detection and suppression, and emergency response.
• Security Consultancy: Risk assessments, security system design, and ongoing support.
• Event Security Management: Crowd control, VIP protection, emergency preparedness, and traffic management.
• Beach Lifeguard Services: Certified lifeguards ensuring water safety and rescues.
• Bouncer Services: Trained personnel managing access and emergencies at events.

Industries served: Oil & Gas, Government, Airports, Retail, Hospitality, Healthcare, Education, Warehousing, and Industrial sectors throughout Qatar.

At QSS, we combine a legacy of trust with innovation to provide reliable, professional security solutions. Our MOI SSD accreditation and experience make us your trusted security partner.

Name: Pontifical Swiss Guard
Description: Tradition and modernity are rarely linked as closely as in the Pontifical Swiss Guard. The Guard has been protecting the Pope and his residence since 1506 and that has not changed to this day. However, the methods of fulfilling orders and the environment in which the guardsmen operate have changed. In the traditional Renaissance uniform there is a young, modern and well-educated Swiss man. Even today, he shares with the 16th century mercenary the firm conviction that the Church of Jesus Christ and the Successor of Peter deserve to be advocated for, if necessary with one's own life. And he still has a certain thirst for adventure in the international environment, the camaraderie, getting to know the security profession and experiencing his own faith more deeply, learning a new language and experiencing the italian culture. In this Mediterranean climate, not only sweet fruits ripen, but also faith, conviction, skills, friendship and joy of life. Find out more about the Pontifical Swiss Guard and place yourself at the service of the Holy Father and the Church.

Name: GPIS-GIE
Description:
Le Groupement Parisien Inter-Bailleurs de Surveillance (GPIS-GIE) est un acteur clé de la tranquillité résidentielle dans le parc social parisien. Depuis 2004, notre groupement agit pour garantir aux locataires un cadre de vie serein, grâce à un dispositif de présence en fin de journée et la nuit, tous les jours de l’année. Les agents du GPIS interviennent principalement sur appel des résidents, tout en assurant des rondes régulières de prévention et de détection des risques.
Aujourd’hui, le GPIS-GIE regroupe 12 bailleurs sociaux et veille sur un parc social de 153 000 logements. En 2024, il a réalisé plus de 46 600 missions, dont 26 241 sollicitées par les locataires. Sa mission repose sur une coopération étroite avec les gardiens, les bailleurs, la ville de Paris, les forces de sécurité intérieure, la police municipale, les associations de locataires et l’ensemble des acteurs du logement social.
Au cœur de ses actions quotidiennes, le GPIS-GIE porte des valeurs fortes : le respect, l’engagement et la solidarité. Ces principes structurent une culture d’entreprise portée par une Charte Éthique que nous partageons sur notre site internet, fruit d’un travail collectif impliquant l’ensemble des salariés. Ce document constitue un guide de conduite favorisant des comportements éthiques et responsables envers les locataires et l’ensemble de nos partenaires. Il incarne une volonté de transparence, de responsabilisation et de cohésion renforcée.
En 2025, le GPIS-GIE s’engage dans la mise en œuvre de son projet stratégique 2025-2030 pour affirmer sa place centrale au sein du continuum de tranquillité résidentielle. 
Le GPIS-GIE conjugue action opérationnelle sur le terrain et capacité d’analyse stratégique, ce qui lui vaut la reconnaissance unanime des bailleurs, des institutions publiques, des locataires et de tous les acteurs œuvrant pour leur sécurité et la cohésion sociale dans l’habitat social parisien.

Name: Grupo Preserve Liserve
Description:
O Grupo Preserve Liserve é controlador das empresas Preserve Segurança e Transporte de Valores, Liserve Vigilância e Transporte de Valores, Liserve Serviços e Terceirização, Sapiens e Partinvest.

Iniciou suas atividades em 1975, atuando fortemente no mercado há mais de 50 anos, logo, acumulou uma vasta experiência na prestação de uma ampla gama de serviços, tais quais: logística de valores (transporte, tratamento, custódia, cofres inteligentes e gestão de ATM - caixas eletrônicos), segurança patrimonial, segurança eletrônica, escolta armada, conservação e limpeza ambiental, terceirização de mão de obra e consultoria em gestão e educação corporativa.

Atualmente são 20 bases operacionais nas capitais e principais cidades do interior dos estados de Alagoas, Bahia, Ceará, Paraíba, Pernambuco, Rio Grande do Norte e Sergipe. Consolidado entre os maiores grupos empresariais do país, nos segmentos de atuação, hoje, somos responsáveis por gerar mais de 10 mil empregos na região nordeste, possuímos uma carteira que ultrapassa 2 mil clientes e uma frota com mais de 500 veículos. Números que transformam a empresa na maior transportadora de valores da região nordeste e a quarta mais importante do Brasil.

Name: IPS Nationwide
Description:
At IPS Nationwide, we are redefining what a modern security and workforce partner looks like. Built on over a decade of experience supporting high-volume events, major commercial properties, and fast-growing retail brands, we deliver more than security — we deliver peace of mind, operational excellence, and a world-class guest experience at scale.

Our teams are trusted at some of the most complex and high-stakes environments in the country because we combine rigorous training, dependable leadership, and a genuine culture of care. We prepare our people not just to protect, but to lead, serve, and elevate the environments they work in.

We believe safety and service go hand in hand. That’s why our approach integrates security, guest services, and operational support into one seamless solution — ensuring clients, attendees, and customers feel safe, welcomed, and valued from the moment they arrive.

As we continue to grow nationwide, we remain committed to innovation. Our goal is to raise the standard of what security and service organizations can achieve.

Choose IPS Nationwide for a partner rooted in integrity, built on family-driven values, and committed to serving and protecting people at the highest level.

Name: Elite Security Services
Description:
Established in 2015, Elite Security Services (ESS) has grown to become one of Qatar’s most trusted names in security. Starting as a company focused on physical guarding, we have evolved into a full-spectrum security provider, offering both manned services and advanced system-based solutions tailored to diverse client needs. Our mission is to deliver peace of mind through reliable protection—ensuring the safety of people, property, and operations.

From day one, our commitment has been to offer professional, proactive, and personalized security solutions. Our strength lies in our trained personnel—security guards licensed by the Ministry of Interior, rigorously screened, and continuously trained in emergency response, conflict resolution, and customer interaction. Whether deployed at residential compounds, commercial buildings, events, or industrial sites, our guards operate with professionalism, discretion, and vigilance. They are not just a security presence—they are trusted representatives of our clients’ values.

As security threats become more complex, Elite Security Services has kept pace by expanding into system-based security. Our technical division offers a wide array of Extra Low Voltage (ELV) solutions, including CCTV surveillance, access control, alarm systems, video intercoms, gate barriers, and smart home automation. We handle the full project lifecycle—from consultation and design to installation and maintenance. Our engineers and technicians ensure that every system we deliver integrates smoothly with a site’s operational flow, enhancing security while reducing vulnerabilities.

What sets ESS apart is our focus on customization. We do not offer off-the-shelf solutions. Instead, we begin with a comprehensive assessment of each site to identify risks, understand operational needs, and recommend an integrated strategy. Often, this includes a mix of manned security and technology-driven systems, supported by our 24/7 control room.

Name: Auxilium Services Limited

 CCTV Monitoring: Our state-of-the-art CCTV monitoring services provide real-time surveillance, ensuring your premises are secure 24/7.

Certifications and Accreditations

We take pride in our commitment to excellence. Auxilium Services Ltd is approved by leading industry bodies, including NASDU, SIA, UKAS, UVDB, and ICO. These certifications reflect our dedication to maintaining the highest standards in the security industry.

Your safety is our top priority, and we're here to provide you with the peace of mind you deserve. Join us in making the world a safer place, one service at a time.

Name: S12 Security Guarding Leadership Group
Description:
The S12 is a unified and elected industry body that brings security leaders together to work as a collective with the Government and the Security Minister.

Our mandate is to address and elevate critical industry issues, promote higher standards and professionalism, enhance public safety, and positively shape the perception of the security guarding sector.

Our mission is to:
•	Ensure consistent, credible and impactful engagement with the Government
•	Represent the interests of the UK security guarding sector to the Government, regulators and stakeholders
•	Work towards always enhancing public safety
•	Ensure that diverse voices are heard, from the largest national providers to the smallest in the industry, along with trade associations capturing the micro providers
•	Promote professional standards, good practice and compliance across the industry
•	Provide a platform for collaboration between businesses and trade associations

The work is split into dedicated workstreams in areas including Training Malpractice, Labour Exploitation, Martyn’s Law, Mandatory Business Licensing, Business Approval Scheme and Integrated Policing and Private Security Initiative.

Security industry representatives who would like to get involved in driving change in the sector are invited to join one or more of the workstream groups at www.securityleaders.co.uk/workstreams.

Name: Lady Askari Tanzania
Description:
Introduction
Lady Askari operates under the umbrella of Uplifting Security Limited, part of BMS Group of Companies, a fully accredited security guard services provider in Tanzania. Lady Askari is a progressive security enterprise with a dedicated mission to propel and empower women within the security sector. By catering to a distinct segment in the market, Lady Askari acknowledges and harnesses the unique skills and strengths that women contribute to this field.

Our Philosophy
Customer service forms the core of our operations, and the collective performance of our team is pivotal to our success. Consequently, we heavily invest in the training and development of our personnel.

Traditionally, the security industry has been predominantly male dominated, presenting substantial barriers and challenges for women despite their unwavering dedication. Our vision was to establish a security company that offers women opportunities to advance and thrive in their security careers.

Vision for Change
Lady Askari is steadfast in its commitment to reshape the perception of women within the security industry and create more pathways for their professional growth. Our goal is to redefine security, one woman at a time, by delivering superior services facilitated by our highly skilled and capable female workforce.

Why Women?

•	Protective Instincts: Embracing women's inherent protective qualities, we capitalize on their intuition and observational skills to safeguard lives and properties.

•	Blending Capabilities: Our female officers adeptly blend into environments, providing discreet yet effective protection, especially for high-profile women and families.

•	Unique Perspectives: By integrating women's insights, emotional intelligence, and empathy, we deliver innovative and empathetic security solutions.
Location: Dar es Salaam, Dar es Salaam

Name: RBO Rijksbeveiliging
Description: Samen werken aan een veilige Rijksoverheid. De Rijks Beveiligings Organisatie (RBO) zet zich dagelijks in voor de beveiliging van rijkslocaties en rijksevenementen. De RBO adviseert welke beveiligingsmaatregelen voor de rijkslocaties noodzakelijk zijn en zorgt dat deze passen binnen het veiligheidsbeleid van de overheidsorganisatie. Van optimale inrichting van de beveiliging tot aan de zorg voor de daadwerkelijke uitvoering. De RBO verzorgt de beveiliging van rijkslocaties, evenementlocaties en bedrijfskritische locaties voor een belangrijk deel zelf. Onze rijksbeveiligers worden ingezet voor specifieke beveiligingstaken en -functies op evenementlocaties en bedrijfskritische locaties. De RBO werkt samen met gecontracteerde particuliere beveiligingsorganisaties (PBO’s). De regie op de totale dienstverlening ligt bij de managers van de RBO. De rijksbeveiligers en de planners zijn het belangrijkste kapitaal. De ‘R’ van Rijks Beveiligings Organisatie geeft aan dat de RBO langdurige, brede en diepgaande kennis op het gebied van beveiliging van de Rijksoverheid heeft opgebouwd. Zowel via de dienstverlening in de vorm van fysieke objectbeveiliging, als via de beveiliging van rijksevenementen. Die kennis is extra waardevol wanneer zich incidenten voordoen. De RBO is wendbaar en kan daardoor snel acteren. Vanuit ruime kennis van en ervaring met de Rijksoverheid is de RBO als geen ander in staat afnemers te adviseren middels een beveiligingsschouw op basis van de (huidige) veiligheidssituatie. De nadruk ligt daarbij op de ‘Te Beschermen Belangen (TBB)’. De locatie specifieke kennis, eisen en wensen vanuit de opdrachtgever worden hier uiteraard in meegenomen. De kracht van de RBO hangt verder samen met de fysieke beveiliging op bedrijfskritische locaties in Nederland. De RBO is hierin gespecialiseerd. Bedrijfskritische locaties worden altijd met eigen rijksbeveiligers van de RBO bemand. Het ‘Rijkseigene’ aan de RBO is de extra kennis die een rijksbeveiliger paraat heeft met be

Name: EGS Security Solutions
Description:
EGS Security Solutions is a risk management and asset protection firm serving C-Suite executives and property leadership across Northern Virginia and Maryland. As a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB), we provide the executive oversight and professional armed capability required to safeguard high-density residential, commercial, and faith-based portfolios.

Our Approach
We do not operate as a staffing agency. We function as a strategic partner focused on operational continuity and liability reduction. While others focus on filling posts, EGS designs and manages proactive security programs that prioritize preparedness and professional judgment.

Core Competencies
Risk Mitigation & Asset Protection: Developing tailored strategies for mixed-use developments, retail corridors, and complex portfolios.

Faith-Based Safety: Providing discreet, concierge-level security specialized for sensitive environments.

Crisis Response & Advisory: Leveraging advanced intelligence and disciplined decision-making to manage emerging threats.

Vendor Accountability: Maintaining high standards of professional vetting and continuous training to protect client reputations.

The EGS Philosophy
Security is an investment in stability, not a line-item expense. We believe that leadership acts before an incident occurs. By aligning our protective services with the specific risk profile of each client, we ensure that life, property, and organizational reputation remain secure.

Description:
Smart Watch Security Ltd is a leading UK-based security services provider, offering a wide range of tailored solutions across the country, with a strong presence in the North of England, including cities like Leeds and Manchester. The company specializes in key services such as **Waking Watch** and **security guarding**, ensuring the safety and protection of residential, commercial, and industrial properties. Their **Waking Watch service** is crucial for fire safety in multi-occupancy buildings, where trained fire marshals conduct continuous patrols to detect early fire hazards and facilitate swift evacuations. This service is particularly vital when fire alarm systems are inadequate or undergoing maintenance, providing round-the-clock vigilance and reassurance to occupants.

In addition, Smart Watch Security Ltd excels in **security guard services**, which include manned guarding, mobile patrols, event security, and remote area monitoring. Their highly trained security personnel provide a visible and proactive presence to deter unauthorized access, prevent vandalism, and respond promptly to incidents. With mobile patrols and remote monitoring, the company ensures comprehensive coverage, including the protection of remote and isolated areas. Their expertise in event security also guarantees safe and controlled environments for gatherings of all sizes through effective crowd management and access control.

Smart Watch Security Ltd delivers services nationwide but has a particular focus on the North of England, combining regional expertise with a national reach. Their team operates with professionalism, undergoing rigorous training and using advanced technology to provide reliable, high-quality security solutions. Accredited by SafeContractor, the company demonstrates its commitment to health, safety, and client satisfaction.

La devise de FOX SECURITY est de réaliser un travail parfait dans le respect des exigences de ses clients.
Notre personnel est spécialement sélectionné et entraîné pour vous assurer un service de qualité et vous proposer les solutions les plus adaptées à vos besoins.

Installé dans le 9è arrondissement de Paris, Fox Security est mobilisé pour assurer votre sécurité au quotidien. Nos prestations sont multiples et s’adaptent à votre demande. Qu’il s’agisse de sécuriser vos évènements, surveiller un bâtiment, d’assurer la sécurité incendie, ou bien de faire appel à nos maîtres-chiens.

Fox Security répond aux besoins croissants des entreprises et des personnalités d’assurer une sécurité fiable. L’entreprise propose aujourd’hui une multitude de solutions pour répondre à la demande de plus en plus forte dans ce secteur.

Nous savons que la sécurité est un sujet sensible. C’est pourquoi nos agents sont expérimentés et font preuve de rigueur lors de leur mission sur le terrain. Nos équipes sont encadrées pour assurer des prestations de qualité qui répondent à vos exigences. Fox Security s’appuie sur des dispositifs développés en cohérence avec votre demande. En effet, chaque entreprise veut une sécurité à la fois très efficace, mais qui n’entrave pas son bon fonctionnement.

Nous mettons en œuvre des moyens techniques et humains adaptés : systèmes de détection anti intrusion, vidéo surveillance, contrôles d’accès, systèmes de vidéophones et de télésurveillance, systèmes pour comptabiliser les personnes, ainsi que détecteurs de métaux et des portiques de sécurité pour sécuriser les accès.

Name: VARG INTERNATIONAL PROTECTION
Description:
VARG Protection est une entreprise spécialisée dans la protection de personnalités à haut niveau, en France et à l’International.

Fondée par des professionnels issus des forces régaliennes Françaises et d’expériences privées reconnues, elle intervient avec discrétion, efficacité et engagement.

Notre expertise couvre aussi bien les milieux urbains sensibles que les environnements confinés, jusqu’aux zones à risques à l’étranger.

Nous assurons la sécurité rapprochée de dirigeants, diplomates, entrepreneurs, influenceurs ou VIP exposés.

Chaque mission est conçue sur mesure, en fonction des menaces réelles, du contexte géographique et des contraintes spécifiques du client. 

Nos agents sont sélectionnés pour leur sang-froid, leur expérience opérationnelle et leur sens absolu de la confidentialité.

Nous travaillons en lien direct avec les forces locales et les institutions partenaires dans plus de 15 pays du monde.

VARG Protection propose également des dispositifs événementiels, de l’escorte sécurisée et du conseil en sûreté stratégique.

Notre modèle repose sur la confiance, la réactivité et une capacité d’adaptation permanente.

VARG n’est pas un simple prestataire : c’est votre rempart discret et loyal, à chaque instant.

Name: Protector - Protecção e Vigilância
Description:
Quando a segurança é prioridade, a confiança tem um nome: PROTECTOR.

Com mais de 30 anos de experiência, a PROTECTOR é uma referência nacional em segurança privada em Angola, protegendo pessoas, património e operações em todas as províncias do país.

Certificada pela ISO 9001, ANPG, APD, entre outras, a empresa alia profissionalismo, tecnologia e fiabilidade para oferecer soluções completas e personalizadas:
 Segurança física e patrimonial – vigilantes formados e equipas preparadas para empresas, condomínios, instituições e eventos.
 Transporte de valores (CIT) – viaturas blindadas e protocolos rigorosos que asseguram a integridade de dinheiro e bens de alto valor.
 Sistemas eletrónicos de segurança – instalação e monitorização de CCTV, centrais de alarmes e controlo de acessos, com resposta imediata 24/24h.
 Centro de Operações – monitorização em tempo real e controlo de frotas por GPS, garantindo eficiência e ação rápida.
 Segurança de eventos e escoltas – planeamento e proteção ajustados a cada ambiente e necessidade.

Com mais de 4.000 profissionais em todo o país, a PROTECTOR é parceira de bancos, indústrias, hotéis, condomínios, embaixadas e projetos de energia, assegurando um serviço de excelência reconhecido pelo mercado.

Continuamos a investir em formação, inovação e tecnologia, porque acreditamos que segurança é confiança — e confiança constrói-se todos os dias.

PROTECTOR – Proteger com excelência. Servir com confiança.

Fondée avec une passion pour la protection des individus et des biens, notre entreprise met à votre disposition des services de sécurité de haute qualité, adaptés à tous types de situations : protection rapprochée, sécurité événementielle, surveillance de sites, transport de valeurs et bien plus encore.

Grâce à une équipe de professionnels expérimentés et formés, nous garantissons une intervention rapide et efficace, en plaçant toujours la sécurité de nos clients au cœur de notre mission. Que vous soyez un particulier, une entreprise ou un organisateur d'événements, nous avons les solutions adaptées à vos besoins.

Nos valeurs :

Excellence : Nous assurons des prestations de qualité, sans compromis.

Fiabilité : Nos équipes sont prêtes à intervenir à tout moment pour garantir votre sécurité.

Adaptabilité : Chaque mission est unique, et nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions sur mesure.

Professionnalisme : Nous respectons les plus hautes normes de sécurité et de confidentialité.


Nos services incluent notamment :

Protection rapprochée de VIP

Services de détectives privés

Sécurité événementielle (concerts, conférences, salons, etc.)

Surveillance de propriétés privées et sites sensibles

Transport de valeurs et biens précieux

Gestion des accès et sécurité des sites

Chez KRK Security, nous comprenons que la sécurité ne se limite pas à la prévention, mais doit aussi inclure la gestion proactive des risques. Notre approche est centrée sur l’humain, et nous travaillons avec nos clients pour mettre en place des solutions sécuritaires sur mesure, à la fois efficaces et adaptées à chaque contexte.

Faites confiance à KRK Security pour protéger ce qui vous est précieux.

Name: Guts Özel Güvenlik ve Eğitim Hizmetleri
Description: 5188 Sayılı Özel Güvenlik Hizmetlerine dair kanun esasları çerçevesinde Türkiye genelinde; fabrikalar, sanayi tesisleri, işyerleri, hastaneler, plazalar, oteller, alışveriş merkezleri, okullar vb. kurum ve kuruluşlarda can ve mal güvenliğini sağlamaya yönelik hizmetler verilmektedir. İçeriden ve dışarıdan gelecek tehlikelere karşı giriş çıkış kapılarının kontrol altına alınması, çalışan personelin kontrolü, çalışan hırsızlığının önlenmesi, sanayi casusluğu, yangın, yaralanmalar ve deprem gibi olaylarda ilk önlemlerin alınması, verilen hizmetin ana unsurlarıdır. Amacımız, huzurunuzun ve güvenliğinizin 24 saat kesintisiz olarak sağlanmasıdır. Hizmet verilecek bölgenin özelliklerine göre, konusunda uzman personel tarafından hazırlanan risk analizleri ve bu riskleri ortadan kaldırmaya yönelik oluşturulan operasyon planları, üçüncü gözün bakış açısıyla bütün detaylar dikkate alınarak hazırlanmaktadır. Özel güvenlik personelinin gece ve gündüz habersiz denetlenmesi, hizmet içi ve iş yerinin özelliklerine yönelik uzmanlaşma eğitimleri ile mevcut riskler, kabul edilebilir düzeylere indirgenmektedir.

Name: WWD Dienstleistung GmbH
Description:
Die WWD Dienstleistung GmbH ist ein erfahrenes und leistungsstarkes Unternehmen für Sicherheits- und Service-Dienstleistungen. Gemäß unserer Philosophie “Der/die Kund*in ist Partner” verstehen wir das Verhältnis zum Auftraggeber als Partnerschaft - verbunden mit der Bereitschaft, den Partner*innen auch bei der strategischen Ausrichtung und Entwicklung zu begleiten.

Unser Leistungsangebot beinhaltet dabei klassische Sicherheitsleistungen wie Objekt- und Werkschutz, Revierstreifendienste und Alarmaufschaltungen sowie Serviceleistungen im Bereich Empfang, Rezeption sowie Kassen- und Garderobendienste. Zudem bieten wir Ihnen Services in den Bereichen Arbeitnehmerüberlassung und Facility Management.

In unserer Branche bedeutet Dienstleistung, die Absicherung eines Grundbedürfnisses unserer Kunden. Das Bedürfnis nach Sicherheit beinhaltet dabei den Schutz von Einzelpersonen, Mitarbeitern, den Schutz von Heim und Familie, aber auch den Schutz materieller Werte, angefangen bei wertvollen Kleingegenständen wie Schmuck bis hin zu Industrieanlagen und -gebäuden.

Für uns liegt die Herausforderung unserer täglichen Arbeit darin, den individuell variierenden Anforderungen an das Sicherheitsbedürfnis unserer Kunden voll und ganz nachzukommen. Aufmerksamkeit, Flexibilität und Hilfsbereitschaft sind dabei die Grundpfeiler unseres Handelns.

Name: Veer Services & Facility Managment
Description:
Veer Services and Facility Management Pvt. Ltd. and its Director Mr. Saurav Raghav and Mr. Pratap Tiwari have vision to bring a change in thinking process of Indian Security System. In current situation anyone who want to be a security personal in India has to be tall and heavy built body wise. 
     On other hand we have noticed that to be a security personal or to handle any event or keeping VIPs safe all you need is skills, combat training and a good working physic rather than big body. 
      As we can see all the para commandos of Indian Army or Navy Seals of US Army most of them have a lean body with the standard height of 5’10”. That’s the best body type if you have skills of combat sports like Boxing, Martial Arts, Krav Maga (founded by Israel Defence Forces ) etc. This helps a person in controlling and handling any kind of situation. As they don’t panic because of their training which will let them to give their 100% in times of danger or any unwanted situation. 
        So, here we are trying to break the stereotype and provided the best trained personals for the best security facilities to VIPs, Events or for round the clock security. To make it possible we want to give chances to the combat sports person which drop their game just to start their professional life as they don’t get as much job opportunities in their field because of great competition. 
         By providing job opportunities in their own field they can pursue their game and achieve great things. Which they usually don’t because of financial crisis and drop out situation from thier game.

Name: City Security Company/شركة سلامة المدن للحراسة الامنية
Description:
نبذه عن الشركة
في يوم: السبت التاريخ:   ٠٢ /    ٠٢ /  ٢٠٠٨م  
تم إصدار سجل مؤسسة سلامة المدن للحراسة الأمنية، بهدف تقديم خدمة الحراسات الأمنية المدنية الخاصة؛ للقطاع  الحكومي و الخاص.  
عملت الشركة منذ نشأتها على تطوير الخدمة، ورفع مستوى الجودة والنوعية؛ لتلبي احتياجات خدمة الحراسات الأمنية.
 
النمو والتطور:
في عام: ٢٠٠٩م تم تحويل مؤسسة سلامة المدن للحراسة الأمنية المدنية الخاصة إلى شركة، وانطلقت الخدمة بجودة عالية في سوق الحراسات الأمنية في المملكة.
وفي عام: ٢٠٠٩م تم رفع تصنيف الشركة الى الفئة الأولى لعدد 1000 حارس أمن، بموجب ترخيص مزاولة النشاط، الصادر من سعادة مدير الأمن العام، برقم:116 وتاريخ: 1426/06/13 هجرية.
 
الإنجازات:
قدمت الشركة خدمات الحراسة الأمنية لجهات حكومية، مثل: وزارة الصحة،  شركة الطيران السعودي،   والشركة الصينية CRCC للسكك الحديدية، وشركة باراسارانا الماليزية، وشركة البرج العالمية للتشغيل والصيانة( وقف الملك عبدالعزيز رحمه الله).
استمرت الشركة في التوسع، وافتتح فرع مكة، جدة، بحرة، بالإضافة للمكتب الرئيسي بالرياض، فساهم ذلك في إضافة عملاء جدد.

Name: Professional Security Officer Live
Description:
Launched in 2023 as part of The Security Event (TSE), Professional Security Officer (PSO) Live is a national hub for security guarding providers to showcase their protection management and business security solutions to front-line professionals and end users responsible for procuring security personnel for their businesses.

Over 450,000 licensed security officers in the UK work on the front-line protecting our communities and managing public safety. Controlling volatile situations and conflict, evolving security threats, criminal activities; there has never been a greater demand to equip, train and support the vital and essential role front-line security professionals play in protecting our people, places and assets. 

PSO brings together the entire sector representing security personnel, service providers and leading technology providers.  Supported by a comprehensive free-to-attend conference that will highlight and address key issues within the sector that include, training and certification, career pathways, standards, health and wellbeing and enhanced physical protection.

Hosted at the UK’s best-connected venue, the NEC Birmingham is ideally located to create a truly national event.  PSO Live runs alongside the UK’s Award-Winning No.1 Commercial, Enterprise & Domestic security show – The Security Event and also co-locates with The Fire Safety Event, The Workplace Event, The National Cyber Security Show and The Health & Safety Event.

Known as 'The Safety & Security Series' that will welcome 1150+ exhibitors and 53k+ visitors

ABOUT NINETEEN GROUP 
Nineteen Group is a rapidly expanding, dynamic and ambitious events business, which like our portfolio has a clear focus. رخصة مزاولة النشاط رقم : 118 وفقا للقانون رقم 86 لسنة 2015
ورؤيتنا هي ( أنت معنا في أمان )

إلتزامات الشركة :
√ تنفيذ الخطة الأمنية طبقاً للتعليمات المستديمة والتأكد من عدم وجود مخالفات أمنية واليقظة التامة.
√ الالتزام بالأعداد المحددة طبقاً للتعاقد المبرم فى جميع أوقات سريان العقد .
√ الالتزام بالزي طبقاً المتعاقد عليه ( المصدق عليه من الأمن العام وطبقا للقانون ) .
√ نقوم بتغيير أى فرد تعترض عليه الجهة المتعاقد معها في خلال 72 ساعة بعد معرفة الأسباب .
√ نلتزم بالتأمينات الاجتماعية والصحية لمراقب الأمن بحيث لا يمثل أى أعباء مادية أو إدارية على عاتق الجهة المتعاقد معها.
√ الإبلاغ الفورى للجهات الأمنية (نجدة – إطفاء – مفرقعات) عند حدوث أي حدث يستدعى ذلك وتحديد نوع الشيء المشتبه فيه بعد التنسيق مع الجهة المتعاقد معها.
√ نلتزم بتوفير السيطرة عبر مركز عمليات الشركة على مدار اليوم .
√ نقوم بعمل خطة للإنقاذ ومكافحة الحريق ( طبقاً لطلب العميل).
√ نلتزم بنظام محدد ومفاجئ للمرور على مراقبي الأمن والمشرفين بصفة دورية للتأكد من إلتزامهم والقيام بواجباتهم على أكمل وجه ومتابعة تنفيذ خطة العمل ومتابعة حركة التسليم والتسلم لمراقبي الأمن على مدار 24 ساعة يومياً .
√ نلتزم بتوفير الدفاتر المخصصة للتسجيل .
√ نلتزم بتوفير بديل الراحات فى الأعياد الاجازات الرسمية ( طبقا للتعاقد ) .

Wij zijn sinds 2001 actief in de dynamische wereld van Safety & Security! Wij zijn er voor het begeleiden, adviseren en inzetten van professionals bij opdrachten op het gebied van safety & security. Daarnaast helpen we je graag bij het opzetten van een compleet veiligheidsbeleid voor o.a. bouw, industrie, weg- en waterbouw, staalbouw, civiel, evenementen en recreatie sector. Onze organisatie bestaat uit drie pijlers:

ADD Security
Objectbeveiliging, evenementenbeveiliging, zonneparkbeveiliging, het beveiligen van een recreatiepark of winkel: je kunt het met een gerust hart aan ADD Security overlaten. Wij zijn de ervaren, goed opgeleide en getrainde specialist!

ADD Safety
Health, Safety & Environment is een specialistisch vakgebied. Voor alle activiteiten die te maken hebben met het voorkomen van onveilige situaties en het geven van advies op het gebied van veiligheid en veilig werken, staan onze specialisten voor je klaar!

ADD Services
Evenementen of bijeenkomsten vragen de ondersteuning van gespecialiseerde medewerkers. EHBO-ers die stand-by staan, een gestroomlijnde afhandeling van je garderobe en de perfecte ontvangst van je gasten. Onze specialisten nemen het je uit handen!  

Binnen de ADD Safety Group werken professionals; naast de vakdiploma's en certificaten beschikken onze medewerkers minimaal over een geldig BHV + AED + reanimatie, EHBO en VCA certificaat.

Op zoek naar meer informatie? Interesse om bij ons aan de slag te gaan? Of wil je weten wat wij voor jouw organisatie of project kunnen betekenen? Neem dan contact met ons op.

ADD Safety Group

Name: Wulf Security
Description:
Wulf Security, a family-owned New Zealand company established in 2016, takes pride in its people-focused approach to security. Founded by Pat Wulf, who boasts over 15 years of industry experience, Wulf Security prioritizes client satisfaction and offers professional security solutions built on integrity, quality service, and a positive work environment.

Wulf Security handpicks and trains its security guards to ensure competence, friendliness, and a team-oriented approach. Every member undergoes certified training to achieve their COA (Certificate of Approval) and receives additional one-on-one training from Pat himself. This commitment to quality ensures a professional and reliable security presence for your business.

At Wulf Security, client needs and service delivery are paramount. We listen attentively to your specific needs and expectations, tailoring solutions that guarantee complete satisfaction. Our core values include:

Quality of Service: We deliver on your needs, ensuring total satisfaction.
Professionalism: Our security guards are the first point of contact for many clients, and we ensure they present a professional and welcoming demeanor.
Integrity: We do exactly what we say we will do, allowing you to relax knowing your business and customers are safe.
Aiga (Family): We treat our employees and clients as family, fostering a strong sense of community and trust.
Our mission is to provide exceptional security solutions through close collaboration with our clients, exceeding their expectations and building long-term relationships. We actively seek feedback to continuously improve our services and deliver the best possible security experience.

As a family-owned business, we are driven by a strong work ethic and the desire to see our "Wulf Security aiga" grow through trusted relationships and exceptional security services.

Name: VTA Security Service EOOD
Description:
Founded in 1994, VTA Security Service is one of Bulgaria’s most trusted providers of integrated security solutions. With more than three decades of industry experience, we specialize in the design, implementation, and maintenance of comprehensive physical and technical security systems.

Our portfolio includes:

- Physical security for commercial, industrial, and residential properties
- Video surveillance and alarm systems with real-time monitoring
- Access control and perimeter protection solutions
- Mobile patrols and rapid response units
- Security for retail parks, logistics centers, events, and office buildings

We pride ourselves on combining innovative technologies with highly trained personnel to deliver smart, reliable, and proactive security services. Our approach is client-centered, flexible, and based on long-term partnerships built on trust and performance.

***********************************************************************************

Основана през 1994г. VTA Security Service е една от най-уважаваните компании в България, специализирана в цялостни решения за сигурност. С повече от 30 години опит, ние предоставяме услуги по проектиране, изграждане и поддръжка на физически и технически системи за сигурност, съобразени с индивидуалните нужди на нашите клиенти.

Нашите услуги включват:

- Физическа охрана на търговски, индустриални и жилищни обекти
-Видеонаблюдение и алармени системи с денонощен мониторинг
- Контрол на достъпа и периметрова защита
- Мобилни патрули и екипи за бързо реагиране
- Охрана на ритейл паркове, логистични бази, събития и офис сгради
- Индивидуални консултации и оценки на риска

Разчитаме на комбинация от съвременни технологии и висококвалифициран персонал, за да осигурим надеждна, интелигентна и превантивна сигурност. Работим с фокус върху клиента и изграждаме дългосрочни партньорства, базирани  на доверие, прозрачност и резултати.

Name: SOGARNET
Description:
**SOGARNET SARL**

**À propos de nous :**
SOGARNET SARL est une entreprise de droit Burkinabé spécialisée dans l'activité privée de sécurité. Notre mission est d'assurer la protection des personnes et des biens en offrant des services de sécurité de haute qualité adaptés aux besoins de nos clients.

**Nos services :**

- **Gardiennage :**
  Nous offrons des services de surveillance et de protection des locaux, entreprises, résidences et sites industriels pour assurer leur sécurité 24/7.

- **Conciergerie :**
  Nos services de conciergerie incluent la gestion des accès, la réception et la surveillance des lieux pour garantir un environnement sûr et accueillant.

- **Protection des personnes et des biens :**
  Nous mettons en place des dispositifs de sécurité pour protéger les personnes et leurs biens contre les menaces et les intrusions.

- **Sécurité rapprochée :**
  Nous fournissons des services de sécurité rapprochée pour assurer la protection personnelle des individus à haut risque, qu'ils soient dans leurs déplacements ou sur leur lieu de résidence.

- **Formations en secourisme :**
  Nous proposons des formations en secourisme pour préparer vos équipes à réagir efficacement en cas d'urgence médicale ou d'accident.

- **Formations des vigiles :**
  Nous offrons des programmes de formation professionnelle pour les vigiles, leur permettant d'acquérir les compétences nécessaires pour assurer la sécurité de manière efficace et professionnelle.

**Contactez-nous :**

Pour plus d'informations sur nos services ou pour discuter de vos besoins en matière de sécurité, veuillez visiter notre site web ou nous contacter par téléphone.

**Site web :** [sorgarnet.com](http://sorgarnet.com)
**Téléphone :** 25 65 30 11

Nous sommes là pour vous offrir des solutions de sécurité fiables et sur mesure pour protéger ce qui compte le plus pour vous.

Residential security
Residential security involves protecting people and their private property from any threats which may include theft, attacks, trespassing or any threat which may jeopardise the safety of residents.

Hotels

Commercial security

Name: Dansk Vagt
Description:
Din vision, vores mission!

Hos Dansk Vagt handler alt om at gøre din vision til vores. Vi er her for at være dit foretrukne vagtselskab, hvor kvalitet og service altid er i fokus. Vi ønsker ikke at være størst – vi ønsker at være bedst.

Hvorfor vælge Dansk Vagt?

Vi er et innovativt, kvalitetsbevidst og serviceorienteret vagtselskab. Som ISO 9001:2015-certificerede kan du være sikker på, at den service, du får, er 100% i orden. Vi benytter aldrig underleverandører og stoler kun på vores eget vagtpersonale, der er trænet i vores høje standarder. Vi er stolte af vores grønne smiley fra Arbejdstilsynet, som understreger vores engagement i et godt arbejdsmiljø og personalepleje.

Vi har eksisteret siden 1982, hvor vi startede som Hovedstadens Butikskontrol, H.B.K.-Vagt Aps. Efter en rekonstruktion i 1997-98 blev vi til Dansk Vagt, og vi ændrede vores fokus fra butikskontrol til en bredere vifte af ydelser som uniformeret center-, service-, port- og receptionsvagt samt alarmudrykning og byggepladstilsyn.

Vi har flere store kunder, der har været med os uafbrudt siden 1986 – et stærkt vidnesbyrd om vores pålidelighed og kvalitet. Vi arbejder stenhårdt hver dag for at levere sikkerhed, service og omstillingsparathed, som vores kunder forventer og fortjener – året rundt.

Vores ISO 9001:2015-certificering betyder også, at vi forpligter os til løbende uddannelse, så alle ansatte mindst to gange om året deltager i vagt- og sikkerhedsrelaterede kurser, godkendt af Bureau Veritas. Dette sikrer, at vi konstant forbedrer os og leverer den bedste service til vores kunder.

Vi satser på kvalitet frem for kvantitet – og det kan mærkes. Hos Dansk Vagt er din sikkerhed vores prioritet. Vælg os, og lad os gøre din vision til virkelighed!

Dansk Vagt - hvor kvalitet og sikkerhed går hånd i hånd. Din vision er vores mission – hver dag, året rundt. Vi sætter dine behov først og skaber tryghed, der varer ved. Vælg Dansk Vagt, hvor din sikkerhed er vores højeste prioritet.

Name: BDLS Bundesverband der Luftsicherheitsunternehmen
Description:
Der Luftverkehr ist einer der sensibelsten Bereiche kritischer Infrastrukturen. Sein sicherer und zuverlässiger Betrieb ist ein unverzichtbarer Baustein für den wirtschaftlichen Erfolg unseres Landes in einem zunehmend vernetzten, mobilen und globalisierten Umfeld.

Jedes Jahr werden an den deutschen Flughäfen über 224 Millionen Passagiere und 4,9 Millionen Tonnen Fracht sowie hunderttausende Beschäftigte von mehr als 23.000 privaten Sicherheitskräften kontrolliert und geschützt – Tendenz steigend.

Um diesem wichtigen und immer wichtiger werdenden Bereich der privaten Sicherheit sowohl thematisch als auch tarifpolitisch gerecht zu werden, wurde 2017 der Wirtschafts- und Arbeitgeberverband BDLS Bundesverband der Luftsicherheitsunternehmen in Berlin gegründet. Die Mitglieder wählten mit Udo Hansen einen erfahrenen Experten der Luftsicherheit zu ihrem Präsidenten. Ihn unterstützen fünf Vizepräsidenten aus den Mitgliedsunternehmen mit ihrem Fachwissen.

Derzeit sind 29 Unternehmen im BDLS vertreten, die sich schwerpunktmäßig mit den umfangreichen Tätigkeiten der Luft- und Flughafensicherheit befassen, zu denen das Luftsicherheitsgesetz Luftsicherheitsbehörden (§ 5 LuftSiG), Flughafenbetreiber (§ 8 LuftSiG) und Fluggesellschaften (§§ 9 und 9a LuftSiG) verpflichtet. 


BDLS-Mitglieder profitieren von einem breiten Leistungsspektrum, dem großen Luftsicherheitsnetzwerk sowie dem Fachwissen der BDLS-Experten.

Als Teil des Fraport Konzerns liegt unser Unternehmenssitz direkt am Frankfurter Flughafen – einem der bedeutendsten Luftverkehrskreuze weltweit. Kurz gesagt: Wir sorgen an den einzelnen Standorten dafür, dass die Fluggäste ihr Ziel gut und vor allem sicher erreichen!

Das geht nur mit einem starken Team. Daher sind wir stets auf der Suche nach neuen Talenten, die Spaß an Herausforderungen haben und sich für abwechslungsreiche Tätigkeitsfelder in einem internationalen Arbeitsumfeld interessieren.

Face à la montée de l'insécurité en Côte d'ivoire, le Gérant d'EGIB a pris sur lui de venir en aide à l'Etat en modifiant son inscription au registre du commerce pour adjoindre le gardiennage à l'entretien des bureaux.

En réponse à une demande à lui adressée par le Gérant d'EGIB, le Ministre de l'intérieur, par courrier N°1083/INT/ATAP/AGP/6 en date du 09 mars 1993, a autorisé celui-ci à créer et à exploiter une entreprise de gardiennage en Côte d'ivoire. C'est cette autorisation qui lui a permis d'entreprendre la fourniture des services de sécurité privée aux entreprises installées sur le sol ivoirien.
Ses activités ayant pris de l'ampleur, l'entreprise EGIB s'est vue transformée le 05 octobre 2006 en Société à responsabilité limité unipersonnelle.

Au fil des années, l’entreprise a élargi ses compétences dans plusieurs domaines de la sécurité privée en intégrant notamment les outils électroniques et l’assistance. Ses activités couvrent tout le territoire national ; Six (06) antennes régionales ont été créées à cet effet : Abidjan, Port Autonome d’Abidjan, Bouaké, San Pedro, Man et Soubré.

De grandes entreprises parmi les plus importantes de la Côte d’Ivoire font confiance à LCA. La longévité du partenariat qui caractérise les prestations de LCA est révélateur de sa démarche professionnelle : être à l’écoute de ses clients, répondre à leurs besoins et leur donner une pleine satisfaction. Cette satisfaction est gagnée à travers un recrutement rigoureux, une formation permanente, des dispositifs de sécurité éprouvés et l’emploi de technologies de pointe.

Efficacité, discrétion et dissuasion sont les points forts qui font la réussite de LCA.

Description:
Jsme bezpečnostní agentura D.I.SEVEN. Už od roku 1995 nabízíme komplexní bezpečnostní a úklidové služby. Zaměřujeme se na fyzickou ostrahu, úklid a vzdálený monitoring PCO (pult centralizované ochrany). Unikátně jsme upravili technologii Active Track (obchůzkový systém), která chrání Vás i naše zaměstnance. Máte tak možnost mít přehled o průběhu fyzické ostrahy v reálném čase.

Máme více než 2500 profesionálních zaměstnanců a náš roční obrat se blíží 820 milionům korun. Více než 4 300 000 Kč darujeme ročně na dobročinné účely, především zařízením pomáhajícím dětem, handicapovaným a zvířatům, či na podporu sportu. Stáli jsme například u zrodu projektu Žiju s handicapem a u založení Zařízení pro děti vyžadující okamžitou pomoc Orlíček Přední Chlum. Podívejte se i na další subjekty a lidi, které podporujeme.

Naše certifikovaná společnost díky husté síti poboček operuje na celém území České republiky. Našim zaměstnancům poskytujeme profesionální školení, přispíváme jim na odbornou certifikaci a vycházíme jim vstříc, třeba i v úpravě pracovní doby. Zaměstnáváme i osoby se zdravotním postižením a dokážeme našim klientům zajistit náhradní plnění. Pokud hledáte zaměstnání, podívejte se do sekce volná místa na našem webu. 
Od roku 2005 se již tradičně staráme o bezpečnost Mezinárodního filmového festivalu v Karlových Varech.
Začátky jedné z největších českých bezpečnostních agentur sahají do roku 1995, kdy ji založil jako společnost s ručením omezeným Pavel Hlaváček. Už o rok později jsme spustili pult centralizované ochrany. V roce 2004 jsme se stali akciovou společností.

Name: GSRI
Description:
Afin d’assurer la tranquillité de ses locataires et lutter contre les incivilités, ACM HABITAT, FDI HABITAT, CDC HABITAT, ERILIA et SFHE se sont associés pour fonder le 1er Groupement de Sûreté Résidentielle Interbailleurs de la Métropole de Montpellier et le 3ème en France. 

Depuis le 20 octobre 2023, les agents de tranquillité résidentielle sont présents sur quatre communes (Montpellier, Castelnau-le-Lez, Juvignac et Jacou) afin d’améliorer de façon significative les problèmes de sécurité et de garantir la tranquillité résidentielle dans l’habitat social. 

Les missions du GSRI : 
- Maintenir l’autorité des bailleurs sur leur patrimoine en fin de journée et la nuit, en faisant respecter le règlement intérieur. 
- Assurer la tranquillité résidentielle et renforcer la sécurité des locataires, Faire respecter le règlement intérieur des bailleurs en fin de journée la nuit.
- Prévenir la délinquance et tous types de nuisances, notamment les occupations illicites des espaces communs (visite de caves, cages d’escaliers, parkings en sous-sol jusqu’aux toitures). 
- Relever des anomalies techniques des bâtiments (panne d’ascenseur, dégradation, etc...). 

Président : Michel CALVO
Directeur Général : Steve LEFEBVRE

Name: Çetin Güvenlik
Description:
Çetin Güvenlik;

‘‘Bizim Olduğumuz Her Yerde Güven Var’’ sloganıyla kurulmuştur. Kurulduğu 1998’den bugüne sürekli büyüyüp gelişen, ülke çapında hizmet verebilen proaktif organizasyon yapısıyla güvenlik sektöründe öncü firmalar arasına adını yazdırmıştır. 
Confederation of European Security Services  - CoESS’in tek asli üyesi olan ve  global ölçekli şirketlerin yer aldığı GÜSOD üyeliğine sahip, ülkemizde özel güvenlik hizmetini uluslararası standartlara taşımış yerel bir şirkettir.

Sektörün gelişen ihtiyaçlarını en doğru şekilde analiz eden, sektörün kaynağı olan insana verdiği değer ile sürdürülebilirlik sağlayan, süreçleri hızlı yöneten dinamik kadrosuyla bugün Türkiye’nin her noktasında hizmet verebilen büyük bir organizasyon ağına sahiptir. Deniz ve havalimanları, AVM’ler, endüstri tesisleri, toplu yaşam alanları, organizasyonlar, üniversiteler, eğitim ve sağlık kuruluşları, oteller, büyük enerji tesisleri başta olmak üzere her ölçekte müşteriye hem ülke genelinde hem de global ölçekte spesifik hizmet sunabilmektedir. 

Çetin Özel Güvenlik, her müşterisine özel çözümler üretmekte ve hizmetlerine en son teknolojik gelişmeleri entegre ederek hem yüksek kaliteli hizmet hem de ekonomik avantajlar sunmaktadır. Müşterilerine sunduğu özel çözümler Alarm İzleme Merkezi ve C Smart Pro Akıllı Tur Kontrol Sistemi ile hizmetlerini 7/24 takip etmekte ve denetlemektedir. Kurumsal Müşteri Portalı ile tüm hizmet süreçlerini müşterileriyle şeffaflık ile paylaşmaktadır.

Description:
Security guarding services across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

 Who We Are

Elegant Services Group (ESG) is one of Saudi Arabia’s most trusted names in professional security guard services, dedicated to protecting people, property, and critical assets from threats, loss, and physical risk.

Since our inception, ESG has focused on delivering tailored, high-performance security solutions — combining skilled Saudi security personnel, K9-trained dogs, and advanced security technology to ensure complete protection and peace of mind for our clients.

 A Legacy of Strength and Growth

ESG entered the Saudi market through the acquisition of Elegant for Industrial Security Co., and by 2001, expanded internationally with the purchase of Elegant Training Bahrain, offering ASIS International–certified Asset Protection Courses to elevate security standards across the region.

By 2006, ESG had established nationwide branch offices in Riyadh, Jeddah, Jubail, and Al-Khafji, ensuring local presence and rapid response capabilities across the Kingdom.

Our regional expertise extends beyond Saudi Arabia — ESG has proudly hosted ASIS International Security Conferences and Exhibitions in Bahrain, bringing together global leaders to advance security practices across the Middle East.

 Our Services

Every day, ESG security officers deliver unmatched security services designed to meet the unique requirements of each client and environment.
Our services include:

Manned Guarding & Patrols – Reliable, professional guards for all facility types.

Armed Security Officers – Highly trained personnel for critical and high-risk operations.

Access Control & Alarm Response – Technology-driven monitoring and incident management.

Security Training Programs – Certified courses.

Ce service est assuré par des agents de sécurité formés ARI, ERP.
Equipés de véhicules spécialisés en contact permanent avec notre centre d’intervention.
Lors d’une intervention, l’agent laisse un avis de passage en indiquant :
- La date et l’heure du déclenchement
- L’heure de son arrivée sur le site
- La zone de déclenchement
- Les éventuelles anomalies constatées
- L’heure de son départ du site
Nos véhicules sont suivis par un système de géo-localisation permanent, nous permettant de vous certifier nos déplacements ainsi que nos points de départ.

Description:

Vasik er ISO-certificeret indenfor vagt og livvagt.

Sammen med vores kunder udvikler vi os hele tiden, og er derfor også blandt de mest moderne vagtselskaber.

I år 2004 blev Vasik Danmarks første ISO certificerede vagtselskab, men grundet personlige omstændigheder lukkede firmaet ned, men åbnede heldigvis op igen i 2012. 

Vasik leverer i dag ydelser af høj kvalitet, og med en stor grad af ensartethed og fleksibilitet til større private og offentlige kunder.

Vi mener selv, vi kan mere end de fleste, da vi har landets bedste vagter.

Vil du vide mere om vores koncepter og muligheder med f.eks. vores Security Management System, styring af alarmudrykninger via en APP på telefonen, vores fantastiske medarbejdere eller vores leveringsgaranti ved behov for en akut vagt, så kontakt os gerne for en uforpligtende samtale. 

Vasik har knap 150 medarbejdere, og vi betjener flere end 100 større offentlige og private kunder, heraf 10 i blandt Danmarks 100 største virksomheder. 

Vi træffes på tlf. 7020 4602 - alle årets dage 24/7/365.

Name: CENTRAL ASSOCIATION OF PRIVATE SECURITY INDUSTRY (CAPSI)
Description:
Central Association of Private Security Industry (CAPSI) - The preeminent organization for security professionals made its unpretentious beginning in 2005 and has emerged as an "elite association" nationally and internationally renowned security professionals managing world's largest workforce of 9 million guardsmen and women engaged in providing private security cover to the nation.

CAPSI, India's leading private security association, is steered by a dedicated management team. This team, comprising committees led by experienced industry professionals, tackles issues like government regulations, training standards, and technology adoption. They advocate for the welfare of security personnel and represent the interests of private security companies nationwide. 

The National Conference for CAPSI (Central Association of Private Security Industry) is an annual event that brings together industry leaders, security professionals, and government officials. It focuses on critical issues facing the private security sector in India. The conference features discussions on emerging technologies, regulatory updates, skill development, and best practices. It's a platform to share knowledge, network, and chart the future of private security in the country.

CAPSI is functioning as a federal body which represents the interest of entire Private Security Industry (PSI) of India. It operates through its State Chapters constituted in every State of the Republic of India. Each State Chapter is being governed by an executive council. 

Member join with CAPSI for better safe guards our nation and security culture to build the nation above the top.

i er en vagt virksomhed med voksne vagter, der opfordrer til dialog, det kendetegnes ved en professionel tilgang til sikkerhed og tryghed. Vi vil gerne vi signalerer erfaring og modenhed, hvilket kan skabe tillid hos jer som kunder.

Name: Rijksbeveiliging
Description:
Rijksbeveiliging is onderdeel van de Rijksorganisatie Beveiliging en Logistiek (RBL). RBL is een agentschap van het ministerie van Binnenlandse Zaken en Koninkrijksrelaties en levert een belangrijke bijdrage aan onze rechtsstaat. Enerzijds door de beveiliging van rijkslocaties, rijksevenementen en bijzondere beveiligingsopdrachten en anderzijds door het vervoer van vertrouwelijke of gerubriceerde zendingen. RBL levert haar diensten aan alle organisaties binnen de Rijksoverheid.

Landelijk en 365 dagen per jaar
Dagelijks zetten ruim 1400 professionals zich in voor een veilige Rijksoverheid en tijdig en betrouwbaar vervoer door heel Nederland. De vakgebieden Rijksbeveiliging (RBO) en Rijkslogistiek (IPKD) worden ondersteund door de gezamenlijke disciplines Bedrijfsvoering en Strategie en Bestuurlijke Zaken. RBL is een flexibele organisatie die meebeweegt met de ontwikkelingen in haar omgeving met goed opgeleide en betrokken medewerkers.

Samen voor een veilige Rijksoverheid
De Rijksbeveiliging (RBO) adviseert over een goede inrichting van de beveiliging en draagt zorg voor de uitvoering. Werken aan een veilige Rijksoverheid doen we samen met onze partners in de veiligheidsketen en met particuliere beveiligingsorganisaties (PBO’s).

Tijdig en betrouwbaar
De Rijkslogistiek (IPKD) is de logistieke partner binnen de Rijksoverheid. We vervoeren producten: van onderzoeksmateriaal tot informatiedragers en archiefmateriaal. Aan burgers bezorgen wij rijksdocumenten zoals gerechtelijke brieven en verblijfsdocumenten. Onze goed getrainde chauffeurs gaan zorgvuldig te werk en bezorgen bij elk (huis)adres in Nederland.

RBL. Betrouwbaar en veilig

Name: TBH Security Services
Description:
Samenvatting voor biografie LinkedIn:

Bij TBH Security zijn we in de business van serieuze beveiliging met een persoonlijke touch. Onder leiding van Ashley Mijnals, een echte professional in de beveiligingssector, zijn wij niet zomaar beveiligers; wij zijn uw 'peace of mind' team. Onze missie? U en uw bedrijf beschermen.

We begrijpen dat veiligheid meer is dan een taak; het is een gemoedstoestand. Daarom gaan we in gesprek met onze klanten, leren we hun bedrijf van binnen en van buiten kennen, zodat we op maat gemaakte beveiligingsoplossingen kunnen bieden die perfect passen bij wat ze nodig hebben. Onze visie is simpel: beveiliging op maat die draait om kwaliteit, betrouwbaarheid en vooral, uw tevredenheid.

Bij TBH Security draait alles om langdurige klantrelaties. We houden van een goede babbel, luisteren naar feedback en werken samen met onze klanten om ervoor te zorgen dat we altijd die topbeveiliging leveren waar ze op kunnen vertrouwen. 

Anno 2024 zijn wij uitgegroeid tot een toonaangevende speler in de beveiligingswereld die altijd gaat voor de beste kwaliteit en innovatie.

Waarom kiezen voor een standaard beveiligingsdienst als je voor TBH Security kunt gaan? Wij zijn uw team voor veiligheid en bescherming, met diensten die variëren van object- en zorgbeveiliging tot evenementenbeveiliging en mobiele surveillance. Bovendien bieden we opleidingen zoals de International Executive Security Academy (IESA) in Polen, zodat we continu de hoogste standaarden kunnen garanderen.

Meer weten over wat wij doen en hoe we uw veiligheid kunnen waarborgen? Bezoek onze website op www.tbhsecurity.nl of neem contact met ons op via info@tbhsecurity.nl. Bij TBH Security staat uw veiligheid altijd voorop.

Let's make security personal.
- Met vriendelijke groet, het TBH security team

Vršimo TEHNIČKO OBEZBEĐENJE

1. Vršimo ugradnju UNIVIEW kamera, koje poseduju sledeće napredne funkcije:

· HEAT MAP
· POS INTERAKCIJA
· BROJANJE LJUDI (kontrola gužve i brojanje ljudi ulaz/izlaz)
· PAMETNA DETEKCIJA ULJEZA (upad u štićenu zonu, prelazak obeležene linije)
· DETEKCIJA I PREPOZNAVANJE LICA (prepoznavanje lica, detekcija tela/lica)
· LPR-prepoznavanje tablica
· DETEKCIJA IZVORA POŽARA

2. Vršimo ugradnju ALARM SISTEMA HIKVISION koji predstavljaju elektronske sisteme tehničke zaštite, čija je osnovna namena detektovanje neovlašćenog ulaska ili štetnog događaja (razbojništvo, požar) u prostoru koji štite i o tome obaveste korisnika sistema.

·  protivprovalni alarmni sistemi – detekcija neovlašćenog pristupa štićenom prostoru
·  protivprepadni alarmni sistemi – zaštita prostora od razbojništva i/ili nasilja
·  protivpožarni alarmni sistemi – detekcija požara u štićenom prostoru
 
3. Vršimo ugradnju NAJMODERNIJE OPREME ZA KONTROLU PRISTUPA. Sistemi kontrole pristupa deluju preventivno na vršenje krivičnih dela, jer daju na znanje potencijalnom izvršiocu da se kretanje u prostoru osmatra i evidentira. Sistemi kontrole pristupa mogu pospešiti i druge poslovne aktivnosti vaše kompanije, kao što je lako i kvalitetno vođenje evidencije o radnom vremenu zaposlenih i/ili upravljanjate parking prostorom. Sistemi kontrole pristupa zasnivaju se na autorizaciji osoba za ulazak, boravak i kretanje štićenim prostorom pomoću:
 
⦁ unosa šifre; očitavanja identifikacione kartice; očitavanja RFID kartice; očitavanja nalepnice; očitavanja priveska; očitavanja mobilnog telefona; očitavanja memorisanih biometrijskih karakteristika.
 
4. Vršimo ugradnju INTERFONA koji pored sigurnosnog aspekta u privatnim kućama i stambenim zgradama, može da se koristi i za komunikaciju sa osobom koja se nalazi ispred ulaznih vrata ili kapije, a, otključavanje se vrši pritiskom na taster interfona, koji otključava elektromagnetnu bravu.

Pored predstavljenih referenci tu su i implementirani sledeći standardi:
· SRPS ISO 9001:2015 - SISTEM MENADŽMENTA KVALITETOM
· SRPS ISO 1401:2015 - SISTEM UPRAVLJANJA ZAŠTITOM ŽIVOTNE SREDINE

Za fizička i pravna lica naš MENADŽMENT IZ KONTROLNOG CENTRA PATROLNIM TIMOVIMA dežura 24 časa, a putem kog po Vašem zahtevu, a u našem kontrolnom centru, možemo pratiti Vaš video-nadzor i alarmni sistem i po potrebi sa našim PATROLNIM TIMOVIMA intervenisati u najkraćem mogućem roku (od 3 do 6 min.), u zavisnosti od daljine štićenog objekta. Ci rivolgiamo a un'ampia gamma di clienti, offrendo soluzioni personalizzate che rispondono in modo puntuale e professionale alle esigenze di ogni singolo ambiente.
Dai cantieri edili alle portinerie di alto livello, dai servizi di accoglienza e controllo accessi fino alla vigilanza non armata per uffici, aziende e strutture ricettive, il nostro personale è formato per agire con prontezza, competenza e rispetto delle normative.

La nostra forza è l’approccio sartoriale: non proponiamo soluzioni standard, ma disegniamo ogni intervento sulle specifiche richieste del cliente, assicurando presenza continua, monitoraggio costante e un servizio sempre visibile ma mai invasivo.

A testimoniare il nostro impegno per la qualità e la crescita continua, abbiamo ottenuto tre importanti certificazioni internazionali:

 ISO 9001 – Sistemi di gestione per la qualità
 ISO 14001 – Gestione ambientale
 ISO 45001 – Salute e sicurezza sul lavoro

Questi riconoscimenti ufficiali certificano non solo l'affidabilità della nostra organizzazione interna, ma anche la capacità di offrire servizi di sicurezza che rispettano rigorosi standard internazionali, in termini di procedure, sostenibilità e tutela delle persone.

 Con NEW NOS SECURITY SRL, la sicurezza non è solo un servizio: è un valore.
Siamo il partner ideale per chi cerca professionalità, flessibilità e un servizio davvero su misura, sempre presente, ovunque serva.

In ogni luogo. In ogni momento. Sempre presenti.

Dies ermöglicht uns auch nach über 14 Jahren auf dem Markt noch immer nach unserem Grundprinzip in Sachen Wertschöpfung zu handeln:

«Wir arbeiten so wie wir es als Kunde erwarten würden»

Um dieses ambitiöse Ziel zu erreichen haben wir gleichermassen faire Konditionen für Kunden, Angestellte und Stakeholder geschaffen. Mit der zunehmenden Anonymisierung, Sparmassnahmen in den öffentlichen Sicherheitsausgaben und dem Wachstum unserer Gesellschaft ist der Bedarf für Sicherheitsdienstleistungen auch in der Zukunft gegeben – um diese Herausforderungen zu meistern sind wir ein starker Partner in jeder Situation.

Es ist unser Ziel auch in der Zukunft ein scheinender Stern in Sachen höchster Qualität im Wettbewerb zu sein. Dafür definieren wir unsere Aufträge und die Grundlage dieser auf eine Art und Weise das unsere Angestellten ihre Arbeit gerne ausführen und durch die Arbeit selbst motiviert werden. Der Fokus unserer Strategie ist die Zufriedenheit jedes Prozessbeteiligten und Nähe zu diesen sowie unsere Verfügbarkeit in der kürzest möglichen Zeit. Unser Personal ist die Grundlage all unseres Erfolges. 24 Security wird in privater Hand geführt und strebt keinen Profit an der die Überlebensfähigkeit übersteigt. Wir waren immer finanziell unabhängig und werden dies auch bleiben. Unsere gute Reputation widerspiegelt sich ebenso in unseren langjährigen Beziehungen mit Kunden und Angestellten die wir aufrechterhalten.

The SRS missions are crucial to National Security and protecting the Site required dedicated, vigilant and well-trained security professionals with state-of-the-art weaponry, training and tactics.

Our focus is to ensure Site operations are not disrupted by criminal or terrorist acts, while protecting Site employees, sensitive information and nuclear materials in a safe and cost-effective manner.

Our employees demonstrate a commitment to professional service every day. Although we plan and train for unexpected events that may pose a threat to the Site, it is the day-to-day performance of our dedicated employees that drive our organization. 

Mission First...People Always defines our approach at the Savannah River Site.  The security of the Site is our mission and that is our top priority.  However, the people of Centerra are our most important resource.  We value not only their talents and expertise but also their input as we strive for continuous improvement.  

Centerra, along with our employees and partner organizations are committed to performance excellence and we look forward to continued success in the future.

Military and Law Enforcement Training  Small Unit Tactics and Private Military Contractor Training  Firearms and Tactical Training  Close Protection, Self-Defense, and Bodyguard Training  UAV Training for Military, Law Enforcement, and Civilian Specialists  Sniper and Marksmanship Training  Operational Planning and Combat Reconnaissance  Tactical and Defensive Driving  Medical Training (FPOS and TCCC Standards)  Maritime Security and Vessel Protection  Brokerage in the Supply of Weapons and Specialized Equipment  International Security Consulting and Training

Name: UpdateTheRFR
Description:
Today less than 1% of Canada’s veterans get work because of the Right of First Refusal (RFR) arrangement. Canadian private security companies and associations have come together to advocate for fair, transparent and open competition in the procurement of security guard services by the Government of Canada.

Providing Veterans with well-coordinated supports that meet their needs and help ease their transition to civilian life is the least a grateful nation can do. The world — and Veterans — have completely changed since 1945. It is time for supports to Veterans to catch up.

Aujourd'hui, moins de 1 % des anciens combattants du Canada trouvent du travail grâce à la politique sur le droit de premier refus (« DPR »). Les entreprises et associations canadiennes de sécurité privée se sont réunies pour défendre une concurrence juste, transparente et ouverte dans l'approvisionnement en services de gardiennage par le gouvernement du Canada.

Offrir aux anciens combattants un soutien adapté à leurs besoins actuels et qui facilite leur transition vers la vie civile est la moindre des choses qu’une nation reconnaissante puisse faire. Le monde – ainsi que les anciens combattants – ont beaucoup changé depuis 1945. Il est temps de rattraper le retard en ce qui concerne notre soutien aux vétérans.

Name: Saint Soldier's Security
Description:
Founded in April 2021 on the unceded traditional and ancestral lands of the Kwantlen, Musqueam, Katzie, Semiahmoo, Tsawwassen, Qayqayt and Kwikewtlem peoples.
Proudly sharing the name vastly used by Sikh community, the word Saint-Soldier (Punjabi: Sant-Sipahi), means to become both spiritually connected to the almighty and skilled with martial arts to protect self and others, as per teachings of the 6th Sikh Guru, Guru Hargobind Singh, which is also reflected in our motto: “protection with compassion.”
The logo is a token of respect towards Maharaja Ranjit Singh (fallen Sikh Empire). Sikh empire was multi-cultural as Ranjit Singh’s army was not limited to the Sikh community, and included Polish, Russian, Spanish, Prussian, European, French, Muslim, and Hindu Officers.
Following the path of our forefathers, Saint Soldiers’ is dedicated in a creating an unbiased-neutral environment by welcoming all the communities into our team.
With a mission to transform lives and empower positive change, Saint Soldiers’ employees work collaboratively to inspire our community and one another. Our success is driven by the dedication and passion of the people who work here, and we strive to attract, develop, reward, and retain our talented employees.

Name: AConcept Protection & Services e.K.
Description:
Unsere Grundlagen sind Ethos und Vertrauen.
AConcept Protection & Security Services (AConcept) legt dabei großen Wert auf Qualität, Integrität und Diskretion. Unser professioneller Ansatz wird vom Streben begleitet, sich selbst und die angebotenen Dienstleistungen kontinuierlich zu verbessern, um auf ein sich wandelndes Umfeld bestmöglich vorbereitet zu sein.
AConcept wurde von Anthony Cash im Jahre 2022 gegründet, um umfassende Sicherheits- und Risikomanagementlösungen anzubieten. Dabei kann er auf eine erfolgreiche Vita zurückschauen: Anthony Cash verfügt über jahrelange Berufserfahrung in der Bereitstellung von Sicherheitsdienstleistungen im In- und Ausland. Während der Personenschutz (unmittelbare/mittelbare) und der Begleitschutz den zentralen Unternehmensschwerpunkt bilden, gehören branchenrelevante Tätigkeitsfelder wie
Unternehmenssicherheit, Pre-Employment-Screening, Objektschutz und Veranstaltungsschutz zu unseren Kernkompetenzen.
Zu unseren nationalen und internationalen Kundinnen und Kunden zählen Privatpersonen, Diplomaten, Prominente aus Musik, Sport und Fernsehen sowie führende multinationale Unternehmen.
Die Sicherheitsanforderungen unserer Kundinnen und Kunden sind dabei stets sehr individuell, genauso wie die von uns angebotenen Sicherheitslösungen. Das Gefahrenpotenzial für Privatpersonen, Unternehmen und deren Mitarbeitende wird durch AConcept maßgeschneiderte Schutzmaßnahmen, Risikoberatung und Unterstützung im In- und Ausland bestmöglich reduziert.AConcept ist ein im Raum Frankfurt am Main ansässiges Unternehmen, das Kunden rund um den Globus betreut.
Wir sind spezialisiert auf die Ausarbeitung individueller Sicherheitskonzepte, abgestimmt auf die konkreten Bedürfnisse unserer Kundinnen und Kunden.
Uns zeichnet langjährige Erfahrung im Umgang mit komplexen Sicherheitslagen und der darauf angepassten diskreten und professionellen Implementierung von effektiven Schutzmaßnahmen im Arbeitsumfeld und Alltag aus.

Name: VCV Vigilanza Città di Varese
Description:
Benvenuti nella Vigilanza Città di Varese, fondata nel lontano 1926. 

Da oltre 90 anni, siamo un baluardo di sicurezza per la nostra comunità e al di là dei confini. 

La nostra storia radicata nel cuore di Varese riflette un impegno senza tempo per la protezione e la tranquillità dei nostri clienti e del Nostro territorio.

Da modesti inizi, siamo cresciuti fino a diventare un punto di riferimento nel settore della sicurezza. 

Con radici profonde e uno sguardo costantemente rivolto al futuro, abbiamo abbracciato l'evoluzione delle tecnologie e delle strategie di sicurezza. 

Le nostre guardie giurate altamente addestrate, unite alla più recente innovazione, ci consentono di offrire servizi di vigilanza impeccabili per rispondere alle mutevoli esigenze della società moderna.

Con una reputazione costruita sulla fiducia e l'integrità, abbiamo svolto un ruolo cruciale nella protezione di importanti eventi, istituzioni, imprese ed Aereoportuali 

Il nostro impegno per la sicurezza è un patrimonio che condividiamo con Varese e oltre. 

Siamo orgogliosi di continuare a preservare l'eredità della nostra fondazione, garantendo la tranquillità della nostra comunità per le generazioni a venire.

Description:
Društvo Sokol d.o.o. sa preko 3000 zaposlenih licenciranih zaštitara, je najveće privatno zaštitarsko društvo za pružanje svih vrsta usluga privatne zaštite u RH.

Poslovna stabilnost, profesionalna odgovornost i stručnost i profesionalnost naših zaposlenika, su kategorije na koje smo iznimno ponosni i po kojima smo prepoznati od strane dugogodišnjih klijenata društva, a za koje usluge zaštite pružamo na razini RH.

Tjelesnom zaštitom štitimo preko 2 000 objekata, na centralni dojavni sustav društva priključeno je oko 11.000 objekata. Društvo također raspolaže najvećom flotom od 265 najsuvremenijih oklopnih vozila za prijevoz vrijednosti i sa 193 službena vozila društva za potrebe naših interventnih grupa, nadzornika i servisera/montažera sustava tehničke zaštite.

Naša polica od 30 milijuna kuna najveća je polica od profesionalne odgovornosti na ukupnom zaštitarskom tržištu u RH.

Visoka kvaliteta usluga zaštite koje pružamo brojnim klijentima društva rezultat je dugogodišnjeg iskustva, pouzdanosti, stručnosti i neprestanog ulaganja u obrazovanje i usavršavanje kadrova, kao i profesionalne organizacije i ustroja rada.

   ❝ GFP SÉCURITÉ est une société de sécurité privée basée à Forbach, au cœur du Grand Est. Nous assurons la protection des biens et des personnes avec une approche humaine, exigeante et engagée.

 Présente sur toute la région (Moselle, Alsace, Meurthe-et-Moselle et Luxembourg), GFP SÉCURITÉ accompagne les entreprises, collectivités, sites industriels, événements et résidences privées dans la mise en place de dispositifs de sûreté adaptés à chaque contexte.

• Sécurité mobile : rondes aléatoires, interventions rapides et assistance sur alarme.

Chez GFP SÉCURITÉ, la qualité du service repose sur la compétence de nos agents, formés et certifiés (CNAPS, SSIAP, CQP APS, SST). Chaque collaborateur est un professionnel engagé, conscient de la responsabilité que représente la sécurité d’autrui.
Notre force : une présence terrain constante, un management de proximité et une réactivité exemplaire.

Fidèles à nos valeurs de discipline, loyauté et professionnalisme, nous plaçons la relation humaine au centre de nos interventions. Chaque client bénéficie d’un suivi personnalisé et d’un interlocuteur unique, garantissant un accompagnement clair et durable.
