Description:
**Acerca de nosotros:**
Grupo Zantza es un conjunto de empresas que inició su andadura en 2016, con una sólida base de experiencia profesional de más de 30 años en el sector de la seguridad privada y facility services. Desde sus inicios, ha sabido conjugar su know-how y la fuerza de un equipo altamente especializado para ofrecer el mejor servicio adaptado a las necesidades de cada cliente. 

**Misión, Visión y Valores**
- **Misión:** Satisfacer todo tipo de necesidades en seguridad privada para empresas del ámbito privado y público, y otras de análogas características.
- **Visión:** Posicionarnos como una empresa brillante y de referencia en el sector de la seguridad privada, enfocada en solventar las distintas necesidades del cliente.
- **Valores:** Una sólida y contrastada experiencia en el sector, junto con un enfoque centrado en el cliente, componen la esencia de Grupo Zantza.

**Filosofía Empresarial**
Grupo Zantza está plenamente comprometido con:
1. La satisfacción de sus clientes.
2. La mejora continua de la organización.
3. La protección del medio ambiente en todos los servicios desarrollados. 

**Nuestros Servicios**
- Servicios de seguridad integral: Vigilancia y seguridad en instalaciones privadas (almacenes, centros comerciales, industrias, hoteles y urbanizaciones), certámenes, convenciones e instalaciones de la Administración Pública. 
- Servicios auxiliares: Soluciones para el desarrollo de la actividad principal del cliente, con personal altamente cualificado: conserjes, información y canalización de visitas, mantenimientos integrales, azafatas de congresos, conductores, control de almacenes, acompañamiento a personas de avanzada edad, rutas escolares, telefonistas, recepcionistas y socorristas. 
- Sistemas de seguridad: Recepción de alarmas, seguridad electrónica, autoprotección, contramedidas, protección contraincendios, y desarrollo de planes

Name: Calan Mitigation LLC
Description:
As the CEO of Calan Mitigation LLC, he leads Tennessee's premier Armed Secure Transportation Agency, headquartered in Nashville. The company specializes in providing unparalleled secure transportation services in high-threat environments, with a focus on areas across Tennessee, including the challenging and high-crime city of Memphis.

In 2024, Memphis was recognized as one of the most dangerous cities in the U.S., and Calan Mitigation LLC is dedicated to ensuring client safety in such environments. His extensive experience includes serving as an Armed Infantry Squad Vehicle Operator in the U.S. Army, where he gained proficiency in weapons handling, armored truck driving with Brink's Inc., and proficiency in Mixed Martial Arts. He graduated boot camp in the U.S. Marines in 2021 from Marine Corps Recruit Depot San Diego, platoon 3205 India Company, which laid the foundation for his disciplined approach and expertise in security operations. At Brink's, he honed his skills in secure transport, mastering advanced tactical communication and defensive driving techniques.

His background in high-risk environments uniquely equips him to offer top-tier security mitigation and transportation services throughout Tennessee. Unlike other executive protection agents who may have a more generalized focus, his experience is specifically tailored to handling high-threat situations and environments. This specialization allows him to provide a level of expertise and assurance that is unmatched in the industry.

Originally from North Philadelphia, he is well-acquainted with high-stress situations and is committed to providing the highest level of service to ensure clients feel secure and protected. Choose Calan Mitigation LLC for a stress-free, secure travel experience in Tennessee. Your safety is their mission.

Name: Aegis Shield, LLC
Description:
We help luxury yacht owners travel safely in high-risk environments without compromising their lifestyle or privacy.

Aegis Shield, LLC excels in Florida's maritime scene by harnessing the founder's elite Special Forces expertise for discreet, high-stakes luxury yacht security. From Tampa Bay to Miami and the Florida Keys, we deliver tailored protection that secures assets with minimal disruption.

Our core competencies include:

- **Elite Discretion and Information Security**: Active TS/SCI clearance ensures ironclad confidentiality for itineraries, guest lists, and activities via stringent non-disclosure protocols, safeguarding privacy during charters or voyages.

- **Proven Physical Security Expertise**: SOF-trained pros provide armed/unarmed protection, perimeter defense, close-quarters tactics, threat neutralization, and SCUBA hull/keel inspections to counter sabotage, tracking devices, boarding, or piracy.

- **Integrated Intelligence and Threat Assessment**: OSINT vetting conducts thorough background screenings for crew/guests, profiling risks and detecting anomalies to preempt insider or external threats.

- **Advanced Technological Integration**: Cybersecurity with GPS/AIS spoofing detection, system hardening, and incident response; plus AI tools like SEA.AI for drone surveillance, real-time aerial intel, and multi-domain maritime defense.

- **Specialized Security Training and Medical Response**: On-site emergency care by Special Forces Medical Sergeants, with TCCC certification and frontline experience; includes custom medical/weapons training to enhance crew resilience and comply with safety standards.

These capabilities position Aegis Shield as Florida's top yacht security provider, blending SOF precision, innovation, and discretion for ultimate peace of mind.

Description:
Unikat Security – Sicherheit, die entlastet und wirkt.

Wer Verantwortung trägt, braucht Partner, die mitdenken. Wir sichern Werte, Menschen und Abläufe – planbar, messbar und mit klarem Fokus auf Entlastung für dein Team. Von der Erstaufnahme bis zum laufenden Betrieb übernehmen wir Planung, Einsatzsteuerung und transparente Dokumentation mit Foto- und Zeitnachweisen. So sinken Aufwand und Risiko – und ihr gewinnt Ruhe sowie Zeit fürs Kerngeschäft.

Was uns auszeichnet
• Geprüfte Teams, klare Prozesse, 24/7-Einsatzbereitschaft – regional verankert in Hamburg & Schleswig-Holstein.
• Kombination aus Präsenz vor Ort und moderner Sicherheitstechnik (Video, Zutritt, Alarm, Brand) – sauber integriert, gewartet und optimiert.
• Maßgeschneiderte Konzepte statt Standardpakete: Risikoanalyse, Umsetzung und laufende Reviews – alles aus einer Hand.

Leistungsfelder (Auszug)
• Werk- & Objektschutz • Empfangs- & Pfortendienste • Revier- & Streifendienst • Baustellenbewachung • Eventsicherheit • Sicherheitstechnik • Sicherheitskonzepte & Risikoanalysen.

Dein Mehrwert in der Praxis
• Weniger Koordination: ein fester Ansprechpartner, klare Zuständigkeiten, proaktive Meldungen.
• Lückenlose Nachweise: Berichte, Fotos, Zeitstempel – für Compliance, Versicherung & interne Audits.
• Schnelle Hilfe im Ernstfall: kurze Reaktionszeiten, Sofortmaßnahmen und strukturierte Eskalation.

Ob Bürokomplex, Industrie, Logistik, Baustelle oder Event – wir passen Schutz und Service an Risiko, Branche und Ablauf an. Das Ergebnis: sichtbare Präsenz, zuverlässige Prävention und professionelle Intervention, wenn’s darauf ankommt.

 Lass uns über deine Sicherheitsziele sprechen.
Schreib uns hier auf LinkedIn oder vereinbare direkt eine unverbindliche Erstberatung. Gemeinsam bauen wir ein Sicherheitssetup, das heute trägt – und morgen mitwächst.

Name: Istituto di Vigilanza Volpe
Description:
L'Istituto di Vigilanza V.O.L.P.E. si trova a Siena, da anni rappresenta un vero e proprio punto di riferimento nel settore della sorveglianza privata diurna e notturna, al servizio di una variegata clientela con tempestività e professionalità.

In particolare, il nostro istituto di vigilanza privata si occupa con massima competenza di videocontrolli, telecamere per sorveglianza, dispositivi o sistemi anti-rapina e antifurto interni o esterni così come tutto ciò che concerne le attività connesse alla sicurezza quali apparecchiature e sistemi elettronici, consulenza e servizi alle imprese.

Al fine di garantire un servizio di vigilanza davvero professionale, ci avvaliamo solo di personale competente e formato circa le più rigide tecniche di intervento in caso di pericolo. Infatti, tutte le nostre guardie giurate hanno frequentato corsi di formazione svolti ai sensi T.U.L.P.S. e S.M.I. per operatore della vigilanza privata, corsi Antincendio a Rischio Elevato presso V.V.F. di Siena e Addetto al controllo Attività Intrattenimento e Pubblico Spettacolo.

Forte di una vasta esperienza maturata in anni di attività come istituto di vigilanza privata, ci distinguiamo da altre realtà aziendali per la
costante ricerca della qualità del servizio, attraverso l’utilizzo di sistemi tecnologicamente avanzati e sempre sottoposti al controllo umano,
grazie a una centrale di telecontrollo dotata dei più sofisticati sistemi elettronici per il monitoraggio a distanza: in questo modo l'Istituto di Vigilanza V.O.L.P.E. è in grado di garantire i più elevati standard di sicurezza.

Name: Build2Watch

Build2Watch werkt met de nieuwste generatie beveiligingscamera’s en maakt gebruik van moderne AI-technologie om verdachte situaties te herkennen en relevante meldingen eruit te filteren. Zo heb je sneller de juiste signalen, minder ruis en meer grip op veiligheid en minder valse meldingen. Wij kunnen zowel infra-rood als thermische camera's leveren afhankelijk van de te bewaken locatie.

Wanneer op de beelden daadwerkelijk sprake is van een incident, zorgen wij voor alarmopvolging door beveiligers en de juiste interventie. Zo combineer je technologie met menselijke opvolging — precies op het juiste moment.

Onze oplossingen
- Compacte camerakast (specialiteit) – eenvoudig door de gebruiker te plaatsen en te verplaatsen
- Mobiele cameramasten – ideaal voor grotere terreinen en overzicht
- Vaste camerainstallaties – van advies en aanleg tot beheer

Name: Doorsec Poland
Description:
Doorsec to firma ochroniarska, która wchodzi na rynek Polski z wysokim poziomem zadowolenia klientów z wielu branż. Firma jest zaangażowana w ciągłe doskonalenie swoich systemów i świadczonych usług, co pomaga utrzymać ją jako firmę wzorcową dla sektora.

          Doorsec jest firmą ochroniarską założoną w 1997 roku w Londynie, w Wielkiej Brytanii. Dostarczamy najwyższą jakoś ochrony dzięki zespołowi, który tworzymy. Wierzymy, że zapewniając uczciwe wynagrodzenie, szkolenia i wsparcie kierownictwa, nasze zespoły są lepiej przygotowane do minimalizowania ryzyka i ochrony Twojej firmy. W ramach naszej strategii rozwoju otworzyliśmy filię w Dubaju, w Zjednoczonych Emiratach Arabskich, następnie w Doha, w Katarze. Obecnie tworzymy nowy oddział we Wrocławiu, w Polsce. Pozwoliło nam to obsługiwać szeroką gamę klientów.

          Nasza oferta obejmuje usługi ochroniarskie dla dużych i małych przedsiębiorstw oraz osób prywatnych. Rozumiemy, że każda firma ma indywidualne potrzeby w zakresie bezpieczeństwa i dzięki współpracy z naszymi klientami, jesteśmy w stanie dostosować nasze usługi do ich specyficznych wymagań. Nasz zespół pomaga w zidentyfikowaniu nieefektywności w bieżących operacjach związanych z bezpieczeństwem i dzięki optymalizacji działań pomagamy obniżyć koszty ogólne i koszty personelu. Naszym celem jest wsparcie klientów w poprawie wyników finansowych przy jednoczesnym zapewnieniu najwyższego poziomu bezpieczeństwa. W Doorsec możesz mieć pewność, że Twoja firma jest chroniona przez najlepszych w branży. Dzięki naszemu wieloletniemu doświadczeniu, zaangażowaniu w szkolenia i rozwój.

Name: The Nation Group
Description:
The Nation Group comprises of four companies linked to provide a wide range of security related services for clients whatever their requirements - from door staff for bars and nightclubs to major international sporting events and festivals
•	Security Nation
•	Nation Training
•	Nation Care Support
•	Feed the Nation


Nation Care Support was created as the Nation Group recognised the need to protect not only care workers and NHS staff that could be at risk of violence and conflict from patients. We evolved into the world of mental health safety whilst maintaining physical protection but with the knowledge to recognise and assist in the care of challenging behaviour while having the sensitivity to deal with the person as a patient, not a criminal. This division of the Group also provides transport for patients in a safe, secure environment - we have the capacity to carry medical staff, if necessary, without them fearing violence towards them during the journey. Our purpose-built vehicles are all equipped with the latest video recording technology.

Feed the Nation is our charitable side of the Nation Group born out of necessity. At Security Nation, we found a significant flaw across the security industry that there is a lack of interest in the welfare of security staff. A well-fed team is a happy team and Security Nation addressed this challenge head-on by investing in our own catering van and chef to ensure that all our team are fed and ready to perform at their best, not only for the client, but for the customers too.  It was at this time we felt it would be a good opportunity for the Nations Group to give a little back to the community, just to make a small difference to the homeless people in Southampton and local families who rely on food banks. This has become a regular event where our staff take the catering van in Southampton regularly to dispense hot food

Name: A Elitbevakning AB
Description:
Stockholms Elitbevakning AB är ett auktoriserat bevakningsföretag med omfattande erfarenhet och nödvändig kompetens för att garantera en säker miljö för kunder och deras egendom. Företagets team är känt för sitt bemötande och serviceinriktade förhållningssätt, alltid strävande efter att överträffa kundernas förväntningar. Med specialisering på hantering av stora evenemang och derby-matcher visar de en imponerande förmåga att hantera krävande och potentiellt farliga situationer på ett säkert sätt. Oavsett om det gäller bevakning av företagslokaler, evenemang eller andra bevakningsbehov, anpassar de sig för att möta kunders krav och erbjuder olika nivåer av bevakningstjänster, skräddarsydda för optimal säkerhet.

Elitevärdar Stockholm AB fokuserar på att tillhandahålla entrévärdar med hög kompetens och professionalism. Deras erfarna team, verksamt inom olika evenemang och miljöer, prioriterar förstklassigt bemötande och service. Genom noggrann utbildning och utmärkta kommunikationsförmågor skapar deras entrévärdar en välkomnande atmosfär där varje gäst känner sig omhändertagen. Deras skicklighet sträcker sig till att hantera olika situationer vid evenemangsentréer, och de är flexibla för olika servicebehov och nivåer. Med ett engagemang för professionell och högkvalitativ service visar företaget en stark vilja att möta och överträffa förväntningarna.

Sammanfattningsvis delar båda bolagen en gemensam strävan att erbjuda högkvalitativa tjänster och skapa positiva kundupplevelser. Med betoning på erfarenhet, bemötande och serviceanpassning demonstrerar de anpassningsförmåga för att möta specifika behov och krav. Ett framstående uppdrag på O'Learys Tolv ytterligare understryker deras kompetens och förmåga att leverera exceptionella tjänster.

Name: Metronotte SAFE
Description:
Metronotte SAFE è la soluzione ideale per la sicurezza della tua casa o attività commerciale. Con oltre 60 anni di esperienza nel settore della vigilanza, Metronotte SAFE è sinonimo di affidabilità e professionalità. Nata nel 1963 ha iniziato fin da subito a offrire servizi di vigilanza notturna per negozi e attività commerciali. Con il tempo, si è poi specializzata anche nella fornitura di impianti di allarme, sia per privati che per grandi aziende.

Grazie alla sua esperienza e alla sua costante ricerca di innovazione, Metronotte SAFE offre oggi servizi di sicurezza avanzati, che vanno dalla vigilanza armata alla sorveglianza, fino alla fornitura di sistemi di antifurto altamente sofisticati.
I servizi personalizzati di Metronotte SAFE si rivolgono sia ai privati che alle aziende. Per i privati, offre la protezione di case, appartamenti e condomini, garantendo la massima sicurezza e tranquillità. Per le aziende, sviluppa soluzioni su misura per uffici, magazzini, stabilimenti e sedi operative, offrendo un livello di protezione superiore.

Il personale altamente qualificato di Metronotte SAFE è sempre pronto a intervenire in caso di emergenza, 24 ore su 24, 7 giorni su 7. La loro presenza costante garantisce la massima protezione e tranquillità ai clienti, che possono contare su un servizio affidabile e professionale.

Metronotte SAFE è operativa in diverse aree geografiche d'Italia, offrendo servizi di sicurezza e vigilanza in varie province del Piemonte, come Alessandria, Asti, Cuneo e Torino, oltre che in altre province come Pavia, Lodi, Cremona, Milano, Genova e Savona per il nord Italia, e Ancona, Pesaro e Urbino per il centro Italia.

Affidarsi a Metronotte SAFE significa scegliere la sicurezza e la tranquillità per la propria casa o attività. Grazie al servizio professionale e altamente qualificato, i clienti possono dormire sonni tranquilli, sapendo di essere protetti da una società con una lunga esperienza nel settore della sicurezza.

Name: Security 5
Description:
Heeft u wel eens stil gestaan bij de mogelijke gevolgen van een inbraak of een ander delict in of bij uw bedrijfspand? De schade die u kunt hebben aan uw pand en de gevolgen van een inbraak voor uw bedrijfsvoering kunnen groot zijn. Een onveilig bedrijventerrein nodigt bovendien niet uit voor klanten. Security 5 kan u helpen de gevolgen zo klein mogelijk te houden.

In 1994 besloten bedrijfsleven, vertegenwoordigd door de IKG Ondernemers-vereniging, de gemeente Gorinchem en de Politie gezamenlijk de veiligheid op onze industrieterreinen aan te pakken. Omdat we toen over 5 bedrijfsterreinen, verspreid over de stad, beschikten, lag de naam voor de hand: Security5. Intussen beveiligen we 7 terreinen en dat aantal zal nog toe gaan nemen.

Onze visie is simpel: de best mogelijke veiligheid bieden op onze industrieterreinen in het algemeen, voor de aangesloten leden in het bijzonder.

Name: Univ3rsalex
Description:
Mi nombre es Alejandro Viana, soy un profesionista de 65 años y tengo una amplia experiencia en el campo de la ingeniería civil. A lo largo de mi vida he tenido la fortuna de conocer diferentes áreas del negocio, desde el transporte público hasta la gestión de una franquicia de agencia de viajes, pero lo que más me apasiona es ayudar a las personas.
Desde muy joven, sentí la necesidad de involucrarme en el comercio y empecé a vender frutas, dulces, revistas y bolear zapatos. Con el tiempo, amplíe mis conocimientos y adquirí experiencia en diferentes nichos del mercado, siempre combinando mis actividades profesionales con las de comercio. Me considero afortunado por haber tenido la oportunidad de conocer buena parte del mundo gracias a mi pasión por viajar.
En 2019, enfrentamos una pandemia que nos obligó a replantear nuestras formas de hacer negocios y adaptarnos a las nuevas condiciones. Fue entonces cuando decidí dar un giro en mi carrera y adentrarme en el mundo del internet, las redes sociales y el comercio digital. Me dediqué a adquirir nuevos conocimientos y habilidades a través de cursos y mentorías virtuales.
En mi búsqueda de ayudar a las personas, descubrí que muchas de ellas se sienten preocupadas por la seguridad de sus hogares y negocios. Es por eso por lo que decidí convertirme en un Promotor Autorizado de la empresa líder en sistemas de vigilancia, monitoreo, alarmas y protección: ADT Seguridad.
Mi misión es brindar a mis clientes la tranquilidad y la confianza de que sus seres queridos y sus bienes están protegidos en todo momento. Me apasiona ayudar a las personas a sentirse seguras y protegidas, y es por eso por lo que me esfuerzo día a día para ofrecer los mejores servicios y asesoramiento personalizado.
Si estás buscando una solución de seguridad confiable y efectiva, no dudes en ponerte en contacto conmigo. Enviame un mensaje al +52 999 256 5656

With years of proven experience and a reputation for reliability, Prime Guard İstanbul is your trusted partner in professional facility protection.

Secure your future with Prime Guard İstanbul – where safety meets precision.

Name: Blade Services
Description:
Blade Services Ltd, based in Camden Town, London (NW1), delivers one thing above all: Solution, Trust, Customer Service and Certainty.

With over 33 years of leadership experience, we provide trusted security, concierge, support workers, cleaning, estate maintenance, facilities management and property guardianship across London and the South East, with 99% of our work coming from recommendations.

What we do:
• Security, Concierge & Support Workers – waking night staff, homeless hostel & shelter security, mobile & static guarding, high-profile event security.
• Cleaning & Estate Maintenance – communal areas, deep cleans, void and post-works cleaning and maintenance.
• Facilities Management & Site Support – traffic marshals, first aiders, front-of-house, caretaking.
• Property Guardianship & Vacant Property Security.

Accreditations:
ISO 9001 (Quality Management), ISO 14001 (Environmental Management), ISO 45001 (Health & Safety), CHAS, SafeContractor, Constructionline Gold, Acclaim and SSIP.

We are long-term homelessness specialists, providing winter shelter and homeless hostel security to the London Borough of Newham for over 16 years, as well as working with housing providers, charities, councils and developers.

People are our difference. We treat our teams with dignity and respect; a large portion of our workforce is PAYE and paid above the London Living Wage, and our staff turnover is exceptionally low – giving clients continuity, reliability and high-performing teams.

Social value is built in, not bolted on:
• Every year we fund and serve a Caribbean Christmas dinner at rough sleeping shelters, bringing warmth, dignity and joy to residents.
• We sponsor young people through SIA training and offer direct employment with Blade Services, opening real pathways into work.

If you’re looking for a reliable, accredited and socially responsible London partner for security services, support workers, cleaning and facilities management, let’s talk.

About Us

Fortis Protection Group is a multifaceted security and risk-management firm based in Idaho that clients across the nation trust. Drawing on decades of law enforcement, military, and executive-level security experience, we blend proven protective tactics with cutting-edge technology to safeguard people, property, and information around the clock. Our multilingual professionals are rigorously vetted, licensed, and continuously trained, ensuring precise, discreet, and dependable protection so you can focus on what matters most.

What We Offer
Our Executive & Close Protection teams provide low-profile personal security details, secure travel planning, and real-time threat mitigation for corporate leaders, dignitaries, and high-profile individuals.
For gatherings large or small, our Event Security Management division delivers end-to-end staffing, crowd-control planning, credentialing, and emergency-response coordination, keeping concerts, sports, and corporate conferences safe and on schedule.
Through Corporate Security & Guard Services, we deploy uniformed or plain-clothes officers, mobile patrols, and 24/7 monitoring that integrate seamlessly with access-control and CCTV systems—ideal for office campuses, distribution centers, hospitals, and more.
Our consultants conduct thorough Risk Assessments, offering site surveys, vulnerability analyses, and custom security program design to help organizations strengthen defenses before threats materialize.
Licensed investigators in our Investigations & Intelligence unit handle surveillance, background checks, due diligence reporting, and insurance or legal inquiries with professionalism and discretion.
We also share our expertise through Training and certification Programs, including NRA-certified firearms instruction, workplace violence prevention, and emergency-preparedness workshops tailored to corporate safety teams and security personnel alike.

Name: ALLSTAR SECURITY GROUP
Description:
AllStar Security Group LLC (ASG) was formed in 2014 to provide a safe environment for events, schools, and places of worship.  Allstar Security Group, LLC is licensed by the Texas Department of Public Safety’s (DPS) Private Security Bureau (PSB). Our License number is #B20696. Our corporate office is in Midland, Texas but we also have a branch office in Weatherford, Texas. ASG provides a multitude of services throughout the state of Texas. From the beginning, we intensely promote integrity and professionalism within our company. When other companies only provide warm bodies, we pride ourselves on a superior quality of service.
 
AllStar Security Group and our officers are in compliance with all licensing rules and regulations of the Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS) and the Texas Private Security Bureau (PSB).  Each Level II Officer has received basic security training and instruction and has passed the required state exam. Each Level III Officer is required by the State of Texas to complete a week-long certification class.  Officers must renew their licenses every two years by completing six hours of continuing education showing firearm proficiency with the firearm the officer uses while on duty. This includes handguns, shotguns, and AR-style firearms.  They may also obtain certifications in Baton, Taser, Handcuffs, and Pepper Spray.
    
 As a security company, we perform extensive background checks on every officer through the Federal Bureau of Investigation, Texas Department of Public Safety, Private Security-Data Base, and the National Sex Offender Registry. All officers are drug/alcohol tested before employment and we conduct random drug/alcohol testing throughout the year.

Each officer is trained for the individual needs of each client. Our officers complete Active Shooter and De-Escalation training.  Ongoing training includes law updates and firearm proficiency with range time. We add in-house training as needed.

Name: Boutique Security
Description:
What Is The Boutique Difference?
/buːˈtiːk/ 

Noun: An establishment that is small, but sophisticated!

Boutique Security is by design a small organisation, affording us the opportunity of focusing all our energies onto our clients and their needs.

We have identified our niche - that of guarding services. We understand what is required in providing a unique niche offering, and so have tailor-made a solution which gets adapted based on our clients specific requirements. Every guarding site is unique with their own set of expectations, and our boutique approach affords us the opportunity to meet our clients expectations.

We use the tagline "Security in Fine Detail" - this is exactly what we do, focusing on the minutiae.

Our manager-to-client ratio is 1:10 - this is unheard of, but we recognise that this is what is required to provide a boutique service.

We have identified typical industry frustrations and changed them by specifically creating systems to eliminate these frustrations.

We practice honesty and transparency in all our dealings with our clients.

We abide by all the industry regulator regulations, and will not compromise on this by using exploitative job schemes.

Our staff are celebrated, and we protect and nurture them via a unique Staff Wellness program - this is to ensure they receive the dignity of which they are so deserving.

• Détection d’anomalies et interventions rapides pour prévenir les intrusions ou comportements suspects.
• Accompagnement personnalisé et rapports d’incidents précis pour une traçabilité rigoureuse des événements.

 Grâce à une équipe engagée, rigoureuse et réactive, nous mettons en place des dispositifs de sécurité adaptés à des environnements divers (entreprises, sites sensibles, espaces publics, sites industriels, etc.). 

Nous innovons constamment pour intégrer les meilleures pratiques et technologies de surveillance, renforçant ainsi la tranquillité d’esprit de nos clients.

Notre mission : Assurer une protection efficace, continue et intelligente, tout en garantissant l’intégrité, la confidentialité et la tranquillité de ceux qui nous font confiance.

Name: VISECORI, Ltda
Description:
Yo como fundador inicio labores en esta rama de seguridad privada el año 2004, en el transcurso de los años, realizo un largo recorrido como vigilante de tal manera que pude vivir en carne propia lo que realmente pasamos quienes nos dedicamos a esto, desde nuestros inicios y conforme va pasando el tiempo en cada lugar, en cada puesto, como vamos agarrando experiencia y entendiendo que cada día se aprende algo nuevo por más experiencia que se tenga, cada paso, cada detalle, cada proceso de evolución y cada reto que nos toca enfrentar con distintos compañeros y distintas jefaturas; todo esto me hizo entender que era necesario evolucionar, hacer algo, luchar por y para esta comunidad, para que pudieran tener una esperanza de estar informados y llegar a estar laborando en un mejor lugar.

   Entre el 2014 y 2015 me abrí páginas, perfiles y distintas redes sociales con nombres previos a lo que he planeado como empresa, después de estos años, se ha querido incursionar en el campo de Seguridad física en Costa Rica, enfocarme en poder presentar una empresa líder a nivel nacional, lo cual no ha sido fácil por distintos factores, pero que estoy intentando lograr aunque me siga costando, todo será gracias al esfuerzo y por mi rectitud e interés de hacer bien las cosas. Pensando en poder contar con un equipo altamente comprometido con la calidad, personal que por experiencia propia sepan y conozcan perfectamente la materia, quienes den todo de sí mismos para poder ofrecer un mejor servicio de eficiencia y calidad. Pronto me presentaré legalmente mientras realizo unos trámites pendientes pero a partir de este punto me presentaré en nombre de VISECORI - Vigilancia y Seguridad de Costa Rica (nosotros).

Description:
Ons beveiligingsbedrijf in Nederland is toegewijd aan het leveren van eersteklas beveiligingsdiensten aan onze klanten. Met jarenlange ervaring in de branche begrijpen we het belang van het handhaven van een veilige omgeving voor zowel bedrijven als particulieren. Ons team van hoogopgeleide en gediplomeerde beveiligingsprofessionals zetten zich in om uitzonderlijke beveiligingsdiensten te leveren die zijn afgestemd op uw specifieke behoeften.

We bieden een breed scala aan beveiligingsdiensten, waaronder surveillance diensten, gebouwbeveiliging, sluiting en opening van faciliteiten, toezicht op evenementen en buurtsurveillance. Onze surveillance-service omvat routinecontroles van uw pand om ervoor te zorgen dat alles veilig is en naar behoren functioneert. Onze gebouwbeveiligingsdienst biedt getrainde beveiligers om uw eigendommen en bezittingen te beschermen, terwijl onze facilitaire sluitings- en openingsservice ervoor zorgt dat uw faciliteiten aan het einde van de dag worden afgesloten en beveiligd en 's ochtends worden geopend.

Tevens bieden wij toezicht op evenementen, waaronder veiligheidsplanning en -beheer, crowd control en rampenbestrijding. Onze beveiligingsprofessionals zijn opgeleid om met elke situatie om te gaan die zich tijdens een evenement kan voordoen, om de veiligheid van alle aanwezigen te waarborgen. Bovendien biedt onze buurtsurveillance gemoedsrust aan bewoners door regelmatig surveillanceronden in het gebied uit te voeren, misdaad af te schrikken en de veiligheid van de gemeenschap te waarborgen.

Binnen ons beveiligingsbedrijf zijn we trots op onze toewijding om uitzonderlijke beveiligingsdiensten aan onze klanten te bieden. Of u nu beveiliging nodig heeft voor uw bedrijf of persoonlijke eigendommen, wij hebben de expertise en ervaring om uw veiligheid en beveiliging te waarborgen. Neem vandaag nog contact met ons op voor meer informatie over hoe we u en uw vermogen kunnen helpen beschermen.

Grazie a questa sinergia, NASAV offre soluzioni complete che uniscono tecnologia e competenza operativa, garantendo prevenzione dei rischi e tutela di persone, beni e infrastrutture. Ogni progetto viene sviluppato su misura, con un approccio orientato all’integrazione e alla scalabilità, così da rispondere in maniera efficace alle esigenze di clienti residenziali, commerciali, industriali e istituzionali.

La centrale operativa attiva 24/7 costituisce il cuore dell’organizzazione: sistemi digitali di ultima generazione e personale qualificato assicurano tempi di reazione rapidi, monitoraggio costante e gestione puntuale degli eventi.

L’impegno di NASAV si fonda su affidabilità, innovazione e personalizzazione: valori che ci permettono di essere non solo fornitori di servizi, ma veri partner strategici nella gestione della sicurezza.

Name: Locke Protective Service
Description:
A BETTER COMPANY TO WORK FOR
We believe that providing protection and security is a profession worthy of respect. We seek out those who approach the task with a professional demeanor and a commitment to long term success. The best way to attract those people is to treat them with the dignity and regard commensurate with their level of commitment, and to reward them for a job well done. The result is a significantly reduced turnover, almost 70% less than our peers. That means more stability and consistency for our customers.

A BETTER COMPANY TO HIRE
We believe that there are clients and companies that recognize that security is not a service that should necessarily be provided by the lowest bidder, as minimal pay results too often in minimal service. With the tragic events of the recent past, we can no longer ignore the need for a heightened awareness and a greater diligence to ensure the security of property and people.

Name: Palisade Security New Zealand
Description:
Palisade Security is a New Zealand–based event and festival security company built on a people-first approach.

We specialise in festivals, live music events, community gatherings, and large-scale activations, providing calm, professional, and approachable security teams who understand that presence matters just as much as protection.

Our focus is simple:
de-escalation over force, communication over confrontation, and safety without intimidation.

Every Palisade guard is trained to operate with respect, clarity, and situational awareness — working alongside organisers, crew, artists, and patrons to create safe, welcoming environments where events can thrive.

We understand the unique pressures of festivals and live events:
long hours, rotating crowds, high-energy environments, and fast-changing risk profiles. Our team is built for exactly that.

Our services include:
• Events & multi-day event (Festival) security
• Crowd management & access control
• Gate & ticketing support
• Patrols & overnight site security
• Incident reporting & compliance support
• Short-notice & contract security staffing

Palisade Security works closely with event organisers to tailor coverage — ensuring the right number of staff, the right attitude, and the right systems are in place.

We don’t just guard spaces — we help events run better.

Name: Shusai - Security
Description:
Introduction:
Shusai is an Australian Indigenous owned security risk management company. We have over forty-five years’ experience working closely with Australia’s largest construction and engineering contractors. During this time, we have pioneered a unique position within the risk management industry with a proven reputation in securing complex and demanding projects.
Shusai is also an Indigenous certified company.
Shusai undertakes important work for the Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander community, without any government support. In particular, Shusai offers Security, Traffic Control to school leavers, and pays the salary and training of those workers up until they find an Apprenticeship in the area of their liking. 
Shusai will also help with the Aboriginal Procurement Policy (A.P.P)
Our director Tim Reilly is a work councillor for our Indigenous workers. 
Tim is also a Darug & Dunghutti person
Shusai Security team are trained in:
•	Security 
•	Risk Reporting 
•	First Aid OFA
•	Building Construction, 90% of our employees are tradesmen that have previous experience on construction sites
Our Security team has an eight to fifteen staff.
Traffic team are trained in:
•	Traffic Control
•	First Aid OFA
Our Traffic Control has an eight-man team, that we train young Indigenous youths to proceed into the construction industry. This training continues to the end of the project and hopefully we can find them all apprenticeships.
We work closely with the local Indigenous in the area to create employment.

With gun violence on the rise, HPA was formed to raise the standards of security and security protocols across all institutional platforms to effectively put an end to domestic terrorism and mass shootings throughout the US.

Keeping your loved ones protected from the threats of evil by any means necessary is our sworn declaration. There is no organization more dedicated to serving your family than Heroes Protecting Angels. Not only are we highly trained security professionals, but at the end of the day, we are mothers and fathers.

Description:
Security and Protection: Provide security and protection to individuals, properties, or assets by patrolling designated areas and monitoring for suspicious activities.

Deterrence: Act as a visible deterrent to potential threats, which includes maintaining a strong presence and responding to security breaches.

Emergency Response: Respond promptly and effectively to emergencies, alarms, and incidents, such as fire, medical emergencies, or security breaches.

Access Control: Enforce access control measures, ensuring only authorized personnel enter restricted areas.

Surveillance: Use surveillance equipment, such as cameras and monitors, to monitor premises and detect security risks.

Report Writing: Maintain detailed logs and write reports on security incidents, observations, and activities during shifts.

Communication: Maintain open and effective communication with supervisors, fellow officers, and relevant personnel via two-way radios or other communication devices.

Customer Service: Provide excellent customer service to clients, visitors, or employees when needed, including assisting with directions or information.

Weapon Handling: Safely and responsibly handle firearms and other security equipment, in strict adherence to local laws and regulations.

Legal Compliance: Ensure compliance with all relevant laws, regulations, and company policies, particularly those related to the use of force and firearms.

Training: Participate in ongoing training programs and stay current with security industry best practices.

Qualifications:

Licensing: Hold a valid armed security guard license or permit, which often requires completion of training and background checks.

Firearms Certification: Possess proper firearms training and certification as required by local laws and regulations.

Physical Fitness: Maintain good physical fitness to perform the duties of an armed security officer effectively.

Calm Under Pressure: Stay composed and make rational decisions in high-pressu

Name: NOKY SECURITY d.o.o.
Description:
Noky Security d.o.o., osnovan 2015. godine u Zagrebu, specijaliziran je za pružanje tjelesnih i tehničkih sigurnosnih usluga za osobe i imovinu. Osnovan od strane iskusnih stručnjaka iz privatnog sektora sigurnosti, naša tvrtka ima za cilj stvoriti visokokvalitetnu, modernu tvrtku za sigurnost prilagođenu potrebama klijenata i zahtjevima tržišta. Zapošljavajući samo stručno i iskusno osoblje, spajamo godine iskustva u jednu tvrtku, stvarajući visoko profesionalno, moderno i učinkovito radno okruženje koje podupire naše poslovanje.

Sjedište tvrtke nalazi se u Zagrebu na adresi Jakova Gotovca 1, gdje se nalazi uprava tvrtke, centralni dojavni sustav, operativni centar i druge specijalizirane usluge. Kao odgovor na zahtjeve tržišta, otvorili smo prvu regionalnu podružnicu u Osijeku na adresi Ivana Gundulića 5, s planovima za otvaranje dodatnih podružnica u budućnosti. Iako blisko koordinirana s matičnim sjedištem, naša regionalna podružnica posjeduje sve potrebne ljudske i tehničke resurse za autonomno djelovanje, nadgledajući provedbu usluga širom regije.

Noky Security nije samo još jedna tvrtka za sigurnost. Brinemo se o svim našim klijentima, cijenimo njihova mišljenja, a njihova sigurnost i zadovoljstvo su nam prioriteti. Svaki projekt pristupamo individualno, s posebnom pažnjom na specifične potrebe klijenata. Integrirajući stručnost naših djelatnika s najsuvremenijom opremom za tehničku zaštitu, stvaramo jedinstvene zaštitne sustave i uvijek postižemo rezultate. Profesionalnim pristupom i kvalitetom usluga uvrstili smo se u sam vrh ponude te postali vrijedan partner sve većem broju poslovnih i privatnih klijenata, na području Republike Hrvatske. Naša široka ponuda uključuje kompletan spektar usluga tjelesne i tehničke zaštite, profesionalne vatrogasne usluge i savjetodavne usluge. Noky Security je tvrtka kojoj s povjerenjem možete prepustiti brigu o sigurnosti vašeg poslovanja, doma, organiziranih događaja te o vašoj osobnoj sigurnosti.

Name: Lonestar Universal Security, LLC
Description:
Ariel Rosa is a former federal law enforcement officer and certified instructor. He holds a Level III certification in security, and is experienced in threat identification, assessment, and solution, as well as the Texas Penal Code. Mr. Rosa is a Level III classroom instructor and a Level III firearms instructor. A master marksman, he holds an NRA certification in firearms. As a certified CPR, AED and First Aid instructor, Mr. Rosa trains all new hires in both of these life-saving procedures. He also holds Personal Radiation Detector (PRD) and Radiation Isotope Radiation Device (RIID) certifications.

Mr. Rosa previously taught law at the Federal Law Enforcement Training Center (FLETC), as well as courses in Service Intelligence, Traffic Check, Title 21 Authority (Narcotics), and Anti-Terrorism. He distinguished himself in many different leadership roles throughout his law enforcement career, serving as a Leadership and Field Training Officer, Community Relations Officer, Collateral Intelligence Officer, Public Information Officer, and Certified Recruiter.

His track record of excellence as an instructor goes back nearly 25 years. Prior to his career in law enforcement, Mr. Rosa was a co-owner and representative of Elite Driving Systems, Inc. In just two years, the company became the 4th largest driving course curriculum provider in Texas. Over a short time, Mr. Rosa accumulated over 5,000 public speaking hours, taught over 17,000 students, and personally trained 210 of the 1600 certified driving instructors in the state of Texas at the time.

Mr. Rosa holds a Bachelor’s of Science in Criminal Justice from Wayland Baptist University and is fluent in Spanish, both verbal and written.

2007 óta az Elektronika Vonala Biztonsági Megoldások Zrt. célja, hogy ügyfelei számára valódi biztonságot és kiszámítható, minőségi kivitelezést nyújtson – egy kézből, saját csapattal.
Vállalatunk fő profilja az elektronikus vagyonvédelmi rendszerek kivitelezése, üzemeltetése és távfelügyelete. Emellett teljeskörű elektromos generálkivitelezést végzünk, beleértve:
1.	riasztó-, kamera- és beléptető rendszerek,
2.	tűzjelzők, videókaputelefonok,
3.	IT- és wifi hálózatok,
4.	valamint erős- és gyengeáramú villamos kivitelezési munkák.
Miért minket választanak ügyfeleink?
Mert nálunk nincsenek kiszervezett részfeladatok – minden munkafolyamatot saját, tapasztalt szakembereink végeznek. Ez gyorsabb, átláthatóbb és megbízhatóbb kivitelezést tesz lehetővé, különösen akkor, amikor komplex rendszerek összehangolására van szükség.
Kiemelt referenciáink közé tartozik a Privat Palace Hotel, a Budabright lakópark, a Gablini cégcsoport, valamint a Modine Hungária Kft. További munkáink megtekinthetők weboldalunkon:
 www.lineelectronic.hu
Ha vállalkozásodnak átfogó biztonságtechnikai vagy elektromos kivitelezési megoldásra van szüksége, keress bizalommal – együtt megtaláljuk a legjobb megoldást.

Name: Intersec A/S
Description:
Intersec´s idégrundlag bygger på en nærværende og vedvarende personlig kontakt til vores kunder.

Vi ser denne dialog som det vigtigste redskab for at kunne betjene vores kunder i henhold til de ønsker og krav de har til os. Det betyder også, at ansvaret ligger hos os, at vi kan påtage os det fulde ansvar for de værdier kunderne ønsker vi skal passe på. Det er vi bevidste om og det har været det overordnede tema i virksomheden siden opstarten i 2001.

Hos intersec lægger vi den største vægt på efterlevelse af etiske regelsæt samt at vores medarbejdere er med til i det daglige arbejde, at påvirke virksomheden i en fortsat positiv retning. Den organisatoriske opbygning er flad og den enkelt medarbejder har mulighed for en direkte kontakt til selskabets øverste ledelse.

Vagtydelser er serviceydelser. Det betyder, at vores kunder, udover vores faglige kompetence, også måler os på vores evne til at servicere. Det er vi helt bevidste om. Derfor har vi altid en tæt dialog med vores kunder omkring de forventninger de har til os, herunder hvilke krav de har til vores medarbejdere som arbejder hos kunden. Sammen med kunden gør vi derfor et grundigt forarbejde for at kunne udvælge det helt rigtige team af medarbejdere.

Name: safety gate
Description:
شركة متخصصة في أعمال حراسة المنشأت من الداخل وفقا للقانون رقم 86 لسنة 2015
خدمات الشركة:
تستهدف الشركة حراسة و تأمين المنشات من الداخل بكافة أنواعها و أنشطتها بالعنصرى البشرى و المادى .
أهم ما يميزنا:
الأهتمام الخاص بالعنصر البشرى نفسيا و فنيا و ماديا باعتباره العنصر ألأهم في عملية التأمين مهما تقدمت التكنولوجيا لكونه المسيطر و المشغل لها 
رسالتنا:
تحقيق الرضاء الكامل لعملائنا من خلال توفير خدمة أمنية متميزة و ايمانهم ان خدمة الأمن المتميزة يتبعها تكلفة أعلى من خدمة الأمن الشكلية 
مجلس الأدارة:
لواء / أحمد رفاعى                                رئيس المجلس
لواء / محمد شريف                                 نائب الرئيس 
لواء/ محمد عامر                                   عضو المجلس 
لواء / مساعد وزير أحمد سليمان             عضو المجلس
خدمات  الشركة:
أولا وضع الخطط الأمنية للمنشأت : 
أول مراحل الحراسة و التأمين وضع خطة أمنية متكاملة بعنصريها البشرى و المادى لمواجهة كافة المخاطر المحتملة. و تقدم الخدمة بمعرفة ضباط سابقين ذو خبرة عالية في المجال و تحت أشراف أحد مساعدى وزير الداخلية السابقين. 
ثانيا تقديم الاستشارات و النصائح الأمنية:
حرصا من الشركة على رفع الثقافة الأمنية لعملائها تقدم النصائح و الأستشارات الأمنية مجانا 
ثالثا توفير ضباط أمن لحراسة المنشآت:
حاصلين على مؤهلات عليا و متوسطة ذو مظهر عام لائق
مؤهلين نفسيا وعلميا و بدنيا
حاصلين على شهادات باجتياز الدورات التدريبية الهامة.
مجهزين بما يتفق مع طبيعة كل موقع و متطلبات الأمن بها
ضباط شرطة و قوات مسلحة سابقين للمرور المفاجئ على المواقع للتأكد من حسن انتظام ضباط الأمن و أداء دورهم على الوجه الأكمل
غرفة عمليات على مدار اليوم لتلقى بلاغات ضباط الأمن و تعزيزهم اذا تطلب الأمر
رابعا توفير الاشراف على الأمن العضوى بالمنشأت:
تلجأ بعض المنشأت الى تعيين أمن عضوى بديلا عن شركات الأمن، فتقدم الشركة خدمة الاشراف و المتابعة بمعرفة ضباط أمن ذو خبرة عالية
خامسا توفير العناصر المادية لحراسة المنشات في حالة تطلب الخطة الأمنية للمنشأت التي تتولى الشركة حراستها بعض العناصر المادية لاستكمال خطة التأمين كمنظومة الحماية المدنية أو منظومة الكاميرات أو كلاب توفره الشركة بمعرفة متخصصين في المجال في حال طلب العميل

HSK2018 er en frivillig forening, der leverer sikkerhed, tryghed og service ved fodboldkampe på MCH Arena og andre større arrangementer i Midtjylland. Vi er en engageret gruppe af frivillige kontrollører, der arbejder professionelt og med hjertet – og som hver gang bidrager til den gode oplevelse for tusindvis af gæster.

Vi blev etableret i 2018 med det formål at skabe et stærkt fællesskab blandt frivillige, der brænder for både fodbold og for at gøre en forskel bag kulisserne. Vores medlemmer er typisk mellem 18 og 65 år og kommer med mange forskellige baggrunde – men deler ønsket om at bidrage til en god stemning og høj sikkerhed på stadion.

Som medlem af HSK2018 får man:

Adgang til spændende kampe og events

Grundig oplæring og faglig udvikling, herunder årlig uddannelsesweekend med fokus på førstehjælp, konflikthåndtering, kommunikation og samarbejde

Et stærkt fællesskab, god forplejning – og masser af oplevelser

Vi samarbejder tæt med FC Midtjylland, MCH Arena og lokale vagtforeninger, og vi lægger stor vægt på at optræde professionelt, med respekt for både publikum og arrangører.

Name: Ottawa Valley Home Watch
Description:
Exterior: 
Conduct a visual inspection, examining windows, doors, sheds, fences, and gates for any indications of vandalism or unauthorized entry. 
Inspect the exterior of the property for any weather-related damage or drainage issues. 
Remove any papers, flyers, or collect mail to maintain the appearance of the property. 

Interior: 
Ensure the security of all window and door locks. 
Verify the functionality of furnace, air conditioner, and water heater. 
Test or flush all water fixtures and drains, adhering to any specified requirements. 
Check circuit breakers for any issues. 
Monitor for signs of pests or infestations. 
Manage the disposal of garbage for collection as needed.  
Inspect smoke detectors and carbon monoxide detectors, replacing batteries if needed.  
Act as the primary point of contact for police, fire, and alarm responses, with standard visit fees applicable. 

Thoroughly document all visits, promptly reporting any areas of concern to the homeowner. Client information and keys are securely managed to ensure client safety.

Description:

Die Spor Sicherheitsdienst GmbH ist Ihr vertrauenswürdiger Partner für professionelle Sicherheitslösungen auf Baustellen. Mit langjähriger Erfahrung und einem spezialisierten Team sorgen wir für die reibungslose und sichere Durchführung von Zutrittskontrollen und den Schutz Ihres Bauprojekts.

Unser Leistungsschwerpunkt liegt auf:

Zutrittskontrolle auf Baustellen: Wir gewährleisten, dass nur autorisierte Personen Zugang zu Ihrer Baustelle erhalten. Mit modernster Technologie und strengen Sicherheitsvorgaben überwachen wir den Zutritt und schützen Ihr Projekt vor unbefugtem Zugang und Diebstahl.
Personen- und Fahrzeugüberprüfung: Unsere geschulten Sicherheitskräfte führen systematische Kontrollen von Personen und Fahrzeugen durch, um einen sicheren und ordnungsgemäßen Ablauf zu gewährleisten.
Baustellenüberwachung: Zusätzlich zur Zutrittskontrolle bieten wir umfassende Überwachungsdienste, um Baustellen rund um die Uhr vor Vandalismus, Diebstahl und unbefugtem Betreten zu schützen.
Dokumentation und Reporting: Unsere lückenlose Dokumentation der Zutrittskontrollen und sicherheitsrelevanten Vorfälle stellt sicher, dass alle Sicherheitsmaßnahmen transparent und nachvollziehbar sind.
Mit der Spor Sicherheitsdienst GmbH profitieren Sie von maßgeschneiderten Sicherheitslösungen, die speziell auf die Herausforderungen und Bedürfnisse von Baustellen zugeschnitten sind. Wir setzen auf höchste Standards in Bezug auf Professionalität, Zuverlässigkeit und modernste Technik, um Ihr Bauprojekt sicher und effizient zu schützen.

Schützen Sie Ihre Baustelle – mit der Spor Sicherheitsdienst GmbH an Ihrer Seite.

Name: H&G Seguridad K9
Description:
H&G Seguridad K9 es una Empresa de Seguridad Privada con Canes: Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios de seguridad privada, desde vigilancia y monitoreo hasta control de acceso y escoltas.

Contamos con un elemento diferenciador significativo en comparación con los servicios de seguridad tradicionales. estas son algunas de las ventajas de utilizar perros en la seguridad privada:
1. Disuasión: La presencia de un perro disuade a los intrusos y criminales de intentar cometer un delito. Los perros tienen un instinto natural de protección y su presencia puede ser intimidante para los potenciales intrusos.
2. Detección: Los perros tienen un sentido del olfato y del oído mucho más desarrollado que el de los humanos. Esto les permite detectar amenazas que los humanos podrían pasar por alto, como drogas, explosivos o personas escondidas.
3. Respuesta rápida: Los perros pueden actuar rápidamente ante una amenaza, lo que puede ser crucial para prevenir un delito o para proteger a las personas en caso de emergencia.
4. Fidelidad y lealtad: Los perros son animales leales y protectores que forman un fuerte vínculo con sus manejadores. Esto los convierte en aliados valiosos en situaciones de peligro.
5. Imagen profesional: La presencia de perros en un entorno de seguridad puede mejorar la imagen profesional de una empresa o institución. Los perros transmiten una imagen de seguridad, confianza y control.
En resumen, los perros en seguridad privada ofrecen una serie de ventajas que los convierten en un elemento diferenciador importante. Si está buscando un servicio de seguridad efectivo y confiable, considere la posibilidad de utilizar perros en su estrategia de seguridad.
Por todo lo anterior consideramos que esta es una ventaja realmente competitiva, tome contacto con nosotros y solicite una demostración en sus dependencias o en nuestro Centro de Entrenamiento.

Name: Trikos International K9

Mike Ritland – founder and owner of Trikos International – joined the US Navy in 1996 and served 12 years as a US Navy SEAL. During that time, he saw action in Operation IRAQI Freedom and the single largest mission in Special Operations history.

Mike served as the lead trainer for Navy SEAL K9 Program for their west coast operations. He has over 20+ years of experience in importing, breeding, raising, and training multiple breeds of dogs. Name: Trust Security Services
Description:
Je huurt geen beveiliging in om alsnog met een onveilig gevoel rond te lopen.
Je wilt rust, overzicht en professionals die verantwoordelijkheid nemen.

Toch voelt beveiliging vaak als “er staat iemand” in plaats van “het is écht veilig”.
En als een omgeving onveilig voelt, kun je niet groeien, presteren of ontspannen.

Wij zorgen voor veiligheid die staat, 24/7.
Met discipline, betrouwbaarheid en maatwerk als fundament.

Zodat medewerkers, bezoekers of bewoners zich veilig voelen én jij kunt doen waar jouw organisatie voor bedoeld is.

Veel organisaties werken al met beveiliging, maar merken dat aanwezigheid niet hetzelfde is als échte veiligheid:
– te weinig initiatief
– te weinig communicatie
– te weinig resultaat

Precies daar stappen wij in.

We leveren professionele beveiliging op maat:
→ voor objecten: van kantoren tot winkelpanden
→ voor evenementen: van lokale bijeenkomsten tot grote crowds
→ voor zorginstellingen: met respect, rust en menselijkheid
→ voor terreinen en projecten: zoals zonneparken en bouwplaatsen
→ voor mobiele surveillance en alarmopvolging
→ en extra diensten zoals brandwachten, nachtbewaking en hondengeleiders

We werken vanuit vier principes die altijd terugkomen:
→ Discipline: geïnspireerd door onze militaire achtergrond
→ Professionaliteit: altijd scherp, altijd representatief
→ Betrouwbaarheid: afspraken zijn afspraken
→ Open communicatie: korte lijnen, snelle actie

We leveren precies wat jouw locatie, risico’s en doelen vragen, niet meer en niet minder.

Waarom dit werkt?
→ Opdrachtgevers uit zorg, bedrijfsleven, vastgoed en evenementen blijven bij ons terugkomen.
→ We zijn officieel goedgekeurd beveiligingsbedrijf (Ministerie van Justitie & Veiligheid).
→ Klanten kiezen voor onze houding, communicatie en kwaliteit.

Je krijgt veiligheid.
Je krijgt maatwerk.
Je krijgt rust.

Wij zorgen dat je omgeving écht veilig is, dag en nacht.

Name: Pallas Secure GmbH
Description:
Die Pallas-Secure GmbH ist ein seriöses, TÜV und ICG zertifiziertes Bewachungsunternehmen, familiengeführt seit Anfang 1990. Die Wurzeln gehen aber noch weiter zum Anfang des 20. Jahrhunderts zurück, zu einem Nachtwächter Namens Stefan Hartl. Er war der Großvater des Mitbegründers der Pallas-Secure GmbH und Nachtwächter in der AU in der Hallertau. Dort lagen seine Tätigkeiten insbesondere in der Meldung von Unfällen auf den nächtlichen Straßen und Bränden sowie die Bewachung von Gebäuden und Grundstücken, um Diebstahldelikten vorzubeugen. Alles Tätigkeiten, die sich nicht viel von den Heutigen unterscheiden.
Mit dem Wandel der Zeit geht auch die Pallas-Secure GmbH und befindet sich in einem stetigen Lern- und Entwicklungsprozess. Gesellschaftliche sowie politische Herausforderungen fordern ein hohes Maß an Analyse und Verständnis für zukünftige Bedürfnisse. Mit dem richtigen Blick dafür entwickeln wir neue Prozesse mit dem Hintergrund der Digitalisierung und Flexibilisierung.

Zudem ist die Ideologie des Unternehmens angelehnt an die der Geschichte der Göttin des Kampfes „Pallas Athene“. Mit ihr verkörpert das Unternehmen besondere Werte und Ansichten. Sie ist die Göttin des Kampfes, der Kunst, der Weisheit und der Strategie. Pallas Athene ist heute bekannt als die Schutzgöttin der Stadt Athen und vieler griechischer Helden, bekannt aus zwei großen Epen von Homer: Ilias und die Odyssee. Die Entscheidung für diesen Namen fiel aktiv auf Pallas, da sie vieles von dem verkörpert, was auch wir sein möchten. Natürlich können wir nicht damit dienen Götter zu sein, aber wie Athene Schutzgöttin von Athen und vieler Helden war, möchten auch wir unseren Kunden den Schutz und die Sicherheit gewährleisten.

Überdies sieht es das Unternehmen als persönliche Aufgabe den Qualitätsanspruch im Sicherheitsgewerbe zu erhalten. Indem es seine Vorbildrolle und Position als bodenständiges, seriöses Familienunternehmen in der Sicherheitsbranche weiter festigt und ausbaut.

Name: i3Global Security Services
Description:
i3GlobalSecurity was a boutique security firm and a division of i3GS, LLC, specializing in Special Investigations and Uniformed Security Operations. Established in early 2009, the company operated with a management team that collectively brought over 100 years of industry experience.

i3GlobalSecurity provided trained, certified, licensed, insured, and bonded Uniformed Security Officers. Each security professional underwent rigorous screening processes that met the standards of i3GS, LLC, and the Florida Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services (DACS).

The company’s pre-employment background investigations exceeded those of most private security firms in Florida. A licensed staff manager oversaw the initial screening of personnel, which included written and oral interviews, aptitude testing, and a 5-panel hair specimen drug screening (testing for THC, Cocaine, Amphetamines, Opiates, and PCP). Extensive in-service training on criminal law and defensive tactics was also part of the onboarding process.

i3GlobalSecurity provided supervisory personnel to ensure strict adherence to general post orders and client-specific rules, regulations, and ordinances. These supervisors served as liaisons between i3GlobalSecurity and its clients, fostering strong relationships with both clients and personnel to uphold the highest standards of service.

The company equipped all security officers with two-way radios or equivalent communication devices to maintain constant contact with the management team, ensuring efficient operations and responsiveness.

In 2016, i3GlobalSecurity was sold to a private investment group, marking a successful transition and integration into a larger platform while preserving its legacy of dedication and professionalism.

Name: Fido Security Technologies, Inc.
Description:
Threats aren’t always easily identifiable.

In reality, they’re more like shadows that linger in the corners of our
consciousness, casting a veil of uncertainty over our daily lives. It’s this
sense of the unknown that keeps us from moving about freely, always
wary of what might lurk around the next corner.

For some, it’s a quiet acknowledgment, a subtle awareness of potential
risks. For others, the idea of danger looms large, a constant shadow that
casts doubt and fear upon their daily lives.

And it’s in that darkness, we can feel helpless to protect the things that
matter most to us.

But the good news is that darkness is easily driven out by light. All it takes
is someone who is willing to stand in the gap and be a force for good.

At Fido, we recognize the weight of this responsibility and the importance
of feeling secure in an uncertain world. That’s why we’re here, ready to
provide reassurance without overwhelming.

We are your steadfast companion dedicated to your safety and peace of
mind. When you hire us, you’re Protected by Fido.

Name: Alberta Federation of Security Guard Agencies
Description:
Vision Statement:
Raising the standard of private security to improve public safety in Alberta.
Mission Statement:
We communicate on behalf of private security guard companies, establishing standards and codes of ethics, information on services, training and information, promoting the industry as a whole while enhancing the image of our profession across Alberta.
As a unified voice we represent industry-leading stakeholders shaping the security landscape for our province.
Objectives
1. We communicate concerns and issues of our members to government agencies.
2. We establish standards and ethics for the security guard service industry, for the benefit of our clients and the protection and safeguarding of the public.
3. We provide information on how to access government agencies and suppliers of services for our industry.
4. We offer training programs, information and education seminars.
5. We inform our members as to the availability and effectiveness of new products and services, using the expertise from within the ranks of the Association to evaluate such products and services.
6. We promote the best interests of our members and the industry as a whole through effective dialog with the law enforcement community, legislators and licensing bodies.
7. We enhance the image of the security practitioners industry across Alberta through the maintenance of professional standards and adherence to a strict code of ethics. We admit only those companies which demonstrate professional standards in keeping with the philosophy of the Association.
8. No dividends or income will be paid to members and that all profits or any income, if any, must be used to promote the company objectives.

Name: HMS Gruppe GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Verlässlichkeit in jedem Bereich – Sicherheit, Sauberkeit, Unterstützung.

Mit unserer Sicherheitskompetenz schaffen wir eine schützende Barriere für Ihre Freiheit und Sorgenfreiheit. Verlassen Sie sich auf uns, um Ihnen den Rücken freizuhalten, während Sie Ihr Leben in vollen Zügen genießen. Ihre Sicherheit ist unsere größte Motivation – vertrauen Sie auf uns, um eine sichere Zukunft zu gestalten.

Doch unsere Verantwortung endet nicht bei der Sicherheit. Denn ein geschütztes Umfeld verdient auch Sauberkeit und Ordnung. Unsere Reinigungsdienste stehen für Gründlichkeit, Verlässlichkeit und Werterhalt. Ob Büro, Gebäude, Glasflächen oder Sonderreinigungen – wir sorgen für hygienische, gepflegte Räume, in denen Sie und Ihre Mitarbeitenden sich wohlfühlen können.

Darüber hinaus unterstützen wir Sie im Alltag – mit praktischer Hilfe, menschlicher Nähe und Respekt. Unsere Haushaltshilfen und Alltagsbegleiter sind für Sie da: beim Putzen, Einkaufen, der Betreuung von Angehörigen oder einfach als helfende Hand im richtigen Moment. Insbesondere für Familien, Senioren und Menschen mit Unterstützungsbedarf im Alltag.

Ob Schutz, Sauberkeit oder Hilfe im Alltag – wir kümmern uns. Persönlich, professionell und mit Herz.

Description:
Wir sind stolz darauf, erstklassige Sicherheitslösungen anzubieten, die gezielt auf die individuellen Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden zugeschnitten sind. Jede Branche und jedes Unternehmen hat spezifische Anforderungen an den Schutz von Menschen, Werten und Eigentum, und wir stellen sicher, dass unsere Lösungen diese Anforderungen nicht nur erfüllen, sondern übertreffen.

Unser erfahrenes Team aus hochqualifizierten Fachkräften steht Ihnen rund um die Uhr zur Verfügung. Durch regelmäßige Schulungen und die Anwendung modernster Sicherheitsverfahren und -technologien sind unsere Mitarbeiter immer bestens vorbereitet, um auf jede Situation schnell und effizient zu reagieren. Ob präventive Maßnahmen, Krisenmanagement oder akute Intervention – wir sorgen dafür, dass Sie stets den höchstmöglichen Schutz genießen.

Wir verstehen, dass Sicherheit nicht nur eine Dienstleistung ist, sondern ein elementarer Bestandteil des Erfolgs und der Stabilität Ihres Unternehmens. Deshalb ist es unser Anspruch, Ihnen nicht nur Schutz zu bieten, sondern auch das Gefühl von Sicherheit und Vertrauen, damit Sie sich ungestört auf Ihre Kernaufgaben konzentrieren können.

Mit maßgeschneiderten Konzepten und einem hohen Maß an Flexibilität passen wir uns stets den sich wandelnden Herausforderungen Ihrer Sicherheitsanforderungen an und stehen Ihnen als zuverlässiger Partner zur Seite – Tag und Nacht, an jedem Ort.

•	Vigilancia física en plantas fabriles, barrios cerrados, galerías y centros culturales, comercios y centros comerciales, consorcios y domicilios particulares, hospitales y clínicas, obras en construcción, y otros.

•	Servicio de custodia personal destinado a personas especialmente expuestas. 
•	Monitoreo de sistemas de videovigilancia (CCTV) y control de accesos.
•	Consultorías, auditorías y capacitación en seguridad para empresas e instituciones.

En Cabral la tranquilidad de quienes confían en nuestro trabajo es nuestra prioridad. Nuestro servicio personalizado incluye el análisis de riesgos a partir de la observación en el terreno, encuentros de asesoría y evaluación de los requerimientos particulares, y el trazado de un plan estratégico de seguridad a medida, con operaciones supervisadas y calibradas periódicamente para asegurar resultados efectivos.

Nuestro equipo está conformado por agentes cuidadosamente seleccionados, evaluados y capacitados de forma continua, cumpliendo con todas las exigencias legales y los más altos estándares en seguridad. 

En Cabral, no solo brindamos seguridad, construimos confianza. 

Agradecemos su atención y quedamos a disposición para ampliar la información, conocer sus necesidades y ofrecerles un plan de seguridad adecuado y actualizado.

Sme plne licencovaná a poistená spoločnosť podnikajúca v oblasti komerčných bezpečnostných služieb v rozsahu zákona: NR SR č.473/2005 Z. z. o poskytovaní služieb v oblasti súkromnej bezpečnosti a o zmene a doplnení niektorých zákonov (zákon o súkromnej bezpečnosti).

Služby fyzickej ochrany poskytujeme v priemyselných areáloch, logistických centrách, administratívnych budovách, maloobchodných prevádzkach, stavbách, školských zariadeniach a v neposlednom rade na hromadných podujatiach.
